| This is deeply troubling, team: Michigan Republicans just chose Kristina Karamo, far-right extremist and outspoken 2020 election denier – who has yet to concede her loss in the 2022 Secretary of State race – as their party chair.

Let’s review some of Karamo’s beliefs:
* Opposed teaching evolution and called public schools “government indoctrination camps.”
* Spread the conspiracy theory that left-wing anarchists were behind the January 6, 2021, attack on the US Capitol.
* Called abortion “child sacrifice” and a “satanic practice.”

By selecting Kristina Karamo as their party chair, Michigan Republicans are doubling down on the kind of dangerous extremism that Michiganders have rejected over and over again. And since Hillary flipped this seat BLUE in 2022 for the first time in over 50 years, you can bet her seat will be one of their top targets – **so we need to start seriously investing in organizing and voter outreach right away.**
---

We're just two months into the 118th Congress, and a Republican opponent has already announced her 2024 campaign to unseat Kim.

clean_body: We're just two months into the 118th Congress, and a Republican opponent has already announced her 2024 campaign to unseat Kim. Did you see the news, Peter? We're just two months into the 118th Congress, and a Republican opponent has already announced her 2024 campaign to unseat Kim. Washington's 8th District is a true purple district – election experts at Sabato's Crystal Ball are saying it only "leans Democratic" – so Republicans are wasting no time getting to work to try to flip it red next year. With an opponent already in this race, it's only a matter of time before the attacks start and other opponents announce their campaigns. This race is officially on, Peter. We need your help to hit the ground running and prepare for the tough fight ahead. sticker!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8407?t=1010&akid=4057%2E5885482%2EUVG5qa ][IMG]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Begin Forwarded Message:

Peter Willis,

The corporate elite and the political system they control rely on dividing
us with culture war issues to distract us from their economic subjugation
of the working class.

We can overcome these divide-and-conquer tactics by focusing on what we
have in common and fighting for each other, even folks we don't know.

Bernie Sanders has long stood for this idea, and we designed a sticker to
honor his conviction of fighting for people you don't know. Donate $10 or
more here and reserve your exclusive sticker!

name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
Omelet Price Index No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qkllddk-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Mayorkas can't define **[what a secure border is](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-y/)**.
* Study: **[Zero Bail](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-j/)** results in more crime.
* Biden **[went to Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* U.S. is **[financially supportin](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-i/)g **Ukraine now.
* James O'Keefe [f**orced out of Project Varitas**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-d/)
* Biden is going to let WHO **[decide our pandemic policies](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-h/).**
* Biden **[challenged Putin](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-k/).**
* A**[train derailed](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-u/) **in Nebraska.
* Now our **[northern border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-o/)** is overwhelmed.
* **[Unused covid money](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-x/)** is being wasted.
* **[Florida dog owners](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-m/)** should protest.
* Press secretary **[reveals the name of the person](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-c/)** running the country.
* **[Trump went to Ohio.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-q/)**

### **One Year Anniversary of Ukraine-Russia War**
The Biden administration and Congress **[has set aside a staggering $113 billion in American taxpayer funds for Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-a/)** in a conflict that has no end in sight. **[Six countries sided with Russia](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkllddk-trhiujldw-f/)** in a vote about ending the conflict.
### **China is Selling****Weapons**** to Russia**

PLEASE REFER TO THE ABOVE CHART FOR KEY LEGISLATION THIS UPCOMING WEEK!However not included in that graphic is [LB 811](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=SfGPO6XaY9_MFVOJfqH6pMKC9k3eFkTVloiL8oKQ6g4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2ODUiLCJyIjoiMWYxOTUyZjEtMmI2NS00YmQwLTVmNzAtNzZjNDM4YzBjMmMxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) taking place on TUESDAY, 28 FEB! This bill will provide behavioral awareness and intervention training for teachers. The goal is for teachers to use reasonable intervention strategies to protect the classroom environment.Each school district will adopt policies that allow teachers to remove students from a class and use reasonable, proactive, and instructive methods to create a safe environment in the classroom and return the student to the class as soon as possible. Reminder: the schedules of these bills may change due to floor proceedings. Please keep that in mind if you are planning to attend in person and confirm the times. NOW IS THE TIME TO FILL THE SEATS OF THE "2ND HOUSE"!

Legislative Update for Week Ending February 25, 2023
The Unicameral began the week with hearings on more great bills to advance a commonsense conservative agenda forward. We ended the week with a declaration of a diplomatic war by the Democrats who are seeking to stop the will of Nebraskans and progress at all costs. They declared a filibuster threat on almost every bill so that movement on any bills will be very slow (if any) this session. They know Republicans and average citizens are winning this session so Democrats are left with procedural gimmicks rather than legitimate issues of debate. Their sophomoric “style” lacks substance. At the NEGOP we are very proud of our Republican State Senators. They have introduced good bills...commonsense bills... and tough “push back on the cultural war” legislation where necessary. The Senators and their staff have worked tirelessly and without complaint. They continue to listen to the people. The Republicans are holding strong on issues that will protect and educate our children. They are committed to tax relief to help our businesses and families which are the building blocks of Nebraska. This week we saw the renewed commitment to our public safety personnel to preserve a core goal of law and order. Senator Brewer had a committee hearing on the devastating effects the non-negotiable vaccine mandate had on our National Guard members. The dramatic drop in numbers of personnel as well as enlistment numbers being down due to Biden’s out-of-touch policies not grounded in individual freedom. We congratulate Senator Brewer’s efforts to change the policies on which the state has some authority to rebuild our National Guard. In the end, we are seeing actions that uphold the priorities we hear are needed from the people each day: public safety, law and order, good education, life, liberty, tax relief, and more. But we do find ourselves at a crossroads based upon the actions of some central Omaha Democrat senators to shut down the business of the Unicameral. What can we do? At the beginning of the session in January, the Party advocated for a change of legislative rules as evidenced in our NEGOP Legislative Plan. This filibuster behavior by Democrats is why we believe a rules fight was needed at the beginning of the session. More on ‘rules’ at the end of this letter. To be clear, our Republican leaders did listen. They would like to revisit the rules...but at the end of the session. You should be extremely pleased with the efforts of our leaders. Unfortunately, this week shows the pain that will happen when, at the beginning of the session, a debate should have happened on new rules on how business will be conducted. The Democrats will seek to shut down the legislature with endless filibusters on every bill. As we have warned in the past, these unreasonable “burn the place down” Democrats don’t compromise. They try to win at ALL COSTS and force their progressive authoritarian agenda down our throats.
One of the reasons our country has drifted off course over the last 20 years is the overall trend of Republicans compromising with Democrats and Democrats giving little to no compromise in return. It’s their way or the highway. The latest temper tantrum is seeking the same result. We are grateful for Republican senators holding strong together at a time like this. We are cautiously building relationships and inviting the few commonsense D’s to leave the chaos of the Democratic Party and join our party. The party that believes in common sense and conservative values. They see the writing on the wall. Now onto the legislative week in review... Life [LB 626](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=aBF3z3_xxs205uOaSTHWY9ltInaedIoFi8A0-hiuN7o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2NDEiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) The Heartbeat Bill advanced out of committee!!! The Committee vote was 4-2. These vote counts have been good at the committee level due to the work of the Speaker and the "Committee on Committees" on Day 1 of the session. One of the reasons the rules were not debated at the beginning is that people were very pleased with the overwhelming Republican makeup of each committee. The rules/committee makeup debate was the dilemma at the beginning of the session. We won on committees but we are somewhat struggling now to move forward because of “no change” in filibuster debate rules. Second, Senator Albrecht introduced [LB 606](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=iWW18vYQlgeCBr3VgNlG6hRSeB2m692nJU6OgR4XgkA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2NDIiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). This bill would help find funding that is outside of taxpayers' dollars and assist centers in helping women navigate their pregnancies. An intentional effort to be “For” as opposed to just “Against” continues to be a theme this year with this party. [LB 574](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=pS2E7YD561uRKzsYiWL6dvlMsAFfcI2Aj77WrqcQE4M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk5NjEiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) Senator Kauth’s bill to protect children from gender-altering procedures advanced out of committee 4-2 and she prioritized it! Children who have gone down this gender-altering path are 19 times more likely to commit suicide. We will be sending out an important message from Senator Kauth on this bill later this next week, stay tuned. She needs your help to protect the children. As a party, we should support her bill and we need to seek solutions to send our kids help, not harm when they encounter this subject, which is pervasive in our schools and society. Suicide prevention preserves life. Helping our kids choose a different path that will save a life is important.Free Speech Senator Albrecht continued her busy week by advocating for free speech.[ LB 637](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=Q-Sw_bgnBH3naFu_DDZdBTDc2UBUq4CH5BxFGs3QKuU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA1OTQiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) is a bill created to address a plague sweeping our local governing bodies across the state with progressively leaning politicians. Many bodies have passed parliamentary procedures, rules, and sought to reduce speaking times of citizens in an effort to silence the citizens from the desired agenda of the few. Institutional bodies would like the agenda at the local level unimpeded by those "pesky" citizens who pay taxes and want to speak on the issues. This week we learned that the NSBA (National School Boards Association) will be hosting a NATIONAL conference in Orlando from April 1 to April 3 to teach school board members how they can better silence the public (they call it effective communication). They will be SPECIFICALLY discussing how they overcame those in Papillion who voiced concerns in their words on “Masks, CRT, Covid, and Library Books”. More recently, the Chairman of the Lancaster County Party was denied his voice from speaking on an issue at the Lancaster County Commission meeting led by another radical Democrat Sean Flowerday. They are having conferences on how to silence the parents! We have governing bodies denying speech on important issues to end an approaching 3-year state of emergency to preserve authoritarian control! Senator Albrecht’s bill is a welcome legislation to change the trajectory of this dangerous trend to violate your First Amendment right to speak by these progressive bodies. Constitutional Carry A diplomatic breakthrough moved[ LB77](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=G9xZgX2G_3DiiSx84OxieghG5cCyijNsg1Og049ybng.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk3MTAiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) closer to passage. The Omaha Police Union dropped their objection to this bill with the adoption of an amendment by Senator Brewer’s office. This has been a long-standing and sticky negotiation on this topic between the Union and Brewer’s office. We are beginning to see the pathway to victory for the passage of this bill with compromises being given by both sides from their original starting positions. Due to the filibuster attempts of the Democrats, scheduled floor debate on this bill for Tuesday was moved to Wednesday, March 1st. Additional delays of bill debates on the floor are likely to occur if “temper tantrums” continue from the Democrats. Be patient with communications as dates originally published for bill debates are likely going to change. We encourage you to watch the Nebraska Legislature page for continued updates to floor debate times.
**IMPORTANT** - Mark your calendars! We will be hosting a breakfast at the State Headquarters (1610 N Street; Lincoln) on Wednesday, March 1st; which is the planned day for the LB77 floor debate. We hope to fuel up our Constitutional supporters for this important 2nd Amendment legislation! If this date changes we will let you know ASAP. Education and Parental Rights On Tuesday, February 28th, [LB811](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=HmihEuMzxigBeOiWkaKt6UFcYKRyPkNGItw0ew0CHpc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2ODUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) by Sen. Murman will be heard in the Education Committee. The bill is the Classroom Safety bill previously introduced by Sen. Groene numerous times, and was filibustered and blocked by Democrats three times in the past five years. The bill says that if a child is being assaulted at school, then a teacher or staff member may reasonably intervene to protect that child. It also says that if a student is being disruptive in class, then the disruptive child may be removed. Currently, if a child is being disruptive in class, the school will often end the class and have the non-disruptive children leave the classroom. It’s no surprise the same Democrats who are blocking the Legislature also don’t like a bill that will return safety, law and order to classrooms. We need testifiers on TUESDAY afternoon who will let the committee know that classroom safety is an important issue. You can also submit online comments for the committee hearing prior to noon on Feb. 27th by clicking [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=HmihEuMzxigBeOiWkaKt6UFcYKRyPkNGItw0ew0CHpc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2ODUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). Establishing Justice and Insuring the Domestic Tranquility Chief Justice Heavican gave his ‘State of the State’ Justice report to the Unicameral. The message was clear. The first two goals in the Preamble of the Constitution need work. Like most businesses and departments, the judicial system is suffering from staffing shortages. The need for more personnel and new prison facilities was highlighted in the speech. Pay was recently increased and a new prison needed to house violent offenders is on the docket to be passed and approved by the legislature. The business of protecting the public from violent offenders by authorizing a new prison is in jeopardy due to the actions of the Central Omaha Democrat Senators. In addition, the Chief Justice touched on the mental health problems plaguing our system. The party has been supportive of the mental health emphasis as we understand the problems this unaddressed issue is having on the entire system. We need to address these critical needs in our justice department to continue to ensure domestic tranquility, provide the common defense, and establish justice in Nebraska.
Taxes Plans continue to move forward on significant tax relief. The Revenue Department reiterated their revenue forecasts. Their forecast of strong revenue continues to enable the plans for tax relief by the body. Friday will be the hearings for the EPIC Consumption Tax [LB79](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=dDi2uxSzjgr39WplNuJ_ZJ6jGdKJCMdzp9mStuHqXhg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAxODMiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). A resolution to support the EPIC tax plan was presented at the SCC meeting in Elkhorn on Jan. 21st and was adopted by the NEGOP governing body by a vote of 77-38. In support of this resolution, we will continue to educate and promote this groundbreaking tax plan which can permanently address the problems of high taxes, exemptions for strong lobbying groups, and property tax carve-out plaguing the politically connected developers. A freer economy, lower taxes, and equality under the law for all developers will be the benefit. Infrastructure Senator Moser introduced [LB 706](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=dmf_MxHrS68BGdFXIz4sS_yzMcHxrh8_z8mEVkP3Suk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA4NDgiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) with the strong support of the Governor to authorize $450 million in bonds to expedite the completion of highways across Nebraska. In addition, the bill delays sunset dates for bonds and increased amounts to be used for annual debt service. The state party emphasized “Building a Premier Infrastructure System including roads, bridges, pipelines, and broadband” in August 2022. We support this bill to achieve this plank in our legislative plan. Election Integrity [LB 228](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=WYhc0EDemnCj_oD90qdjvRKI_MwyYvLTx7HP1o_r45o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNjMiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)/ [LB 230](https://www.ne.gop/so/73OQ9wRJt/c?w=t9Zggy7KT-mpOdo35mYBRsg4fENpTG60CwqGerD1rpU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNTUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)This upcoming week will help set the future direction of this state in elections. Senator Erdman’s bill on Voter ID will be heard on Wednesday. The state party has been intimately involved in many of the clauses of these bills. This opportunity to drastically alter the security of elections in Nebraska is because of the amazing work done by the NEGOP Legislative Committee and the Legislative Plan adopted in August of 2022. The leaders of the NEGOP listened to the membership, honored our constitution and completed the work of the Legislative Plan, built the relationship with Senators to advance common-sense legislation and we are very close to securing a component of our election process. Thank you, to all who have been a part of this process. BUT...we need you there to testify on Wednesday, March 1st to change the trajectory of the security of our elections at the public hearing. As usual, the Democrats are looking to sidestep the State Constitution and argue that Voter ID does not have to happen if the legislature cannot agree to the rules. It is time we uphold the Constitution and advance true election integrity.
Rules
In summary, a lot of excellent legislative work is on the table to move the general welfare of this state forward while reinforcing individual rights and enabling the goal of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for Nebraskans. This work is being stonewalled by Democrats. At this time, we will reprint the often overlooked part of the legislative plan the governing body of the party passed in Hastings on August 2022. Rules are needed to advance the common sense agenda of Nebraskans forward. We believe the effect of delaying the decision to debate the rules is now coming home to roost. Often overlooked because of its lack of “Hot Topic” material, ‘rules’ may have been the most important part of the plan to enable progress at the Unicameral. We reprint this legislative plank unedited for your benefit below. MODERNIZE NEBRASKA LEGISLATIVE RULES TO REFLECT “WE THE PEOPLE” The Nebraska Unicameral has been plagued by outdated rules and procedures that do not reflect the values and needs of its citizens. As a result, a small group of senators can block legislation desired by an overwhelming majority of Nebraska families and communities. It is way overdue for legislators to change their procedural rules so beneficial legislation may become law. • Require open and transparent senator votes when electing legislative committee chairs • Reduce the cloture vote requirement so that 17 senators cannot block legislation • Make the Unicameral a partisan body so voters know their senator’s party allegiance • Make available online video recordings of all floor debates and hearings within 24 hours • Require all legislative fiscal notes are publicly available three days prior to a hearing.
Encourage your Senators to address the rules so that these radical Democrats from Omaha don’t stop the progress of the state.
Until next week... We need your donations to continue to provide this level of advocacy and education. Our Nebraska Republican Legislative efforts need citizen support and we encourage you to become a monthly donor to the NEGOP to help advocate for commonsense policies across our state. Help us create a critical mass to get these bills across the finish line. We need you engaged! Todd WatsonNEGOP Political DirectorPolitical@ne.gop

We ended the week with a declaration of a diplomatic war by the Democrats who are seeking to stop the will of Nebraskans and progress at all costs. They declared a filibuster threat on almost every bill so that movement on any bills will be very slow (if any) this session. They know Republicans and average citizens are winning this session so Democrats are left with procedural gimmicks rather than legitimate issues of debate. Their sophomoric “style” lacks substance. At the NEGOP we are very proud of our Republican State Senators. They have introduced good bills...commonsense bills... and tough “push back on the cultural war” legislation where necessary. The Senators and their staff have worked tirelessly and without complaint. They continue to listen to the people. The Republicans are holding strong on issues that will protect and educate our children. They are committed to tax relief to help our businesses and families which are the building blocks of Nebraska. This week we saw the renewed commitment to our public safety personnel to preserve a core goal of law and order. Senator Brewer had a committee hearing on the devastating effects the non-negotiable vaccine mandate had on our National Guard members. The dramatic drop in numbers of personnel as well as enlistment numbers being down due to Biden’s out-of-touch policies not grounded in individual freedom. We congratulate Senator Brewer’s efforts to change the policies on which the state has some authority to rebuild our National Guard. In the end, we are seeing actions that uphold the priorities we hear are needed from the people each day: public safety, law and order, good education, life, liberty, tax relief, and more. But we do find ourselves at a crossroads based upon the actions of some central Omaha Democrat senators to shut down the business of the Unicameral. What can we do? This filibuster behavior by Democrats is why we believe a rules fight was needed at the beginning of the session. More on ‘rules’ at the end of this letter. We are cautiously building relationships and inviting the few commonsense D’s to leave the chaos of the Democratic Party and join our party. It also says that if a student is being disruptive in class, then the disruptive child may be removed. Currently, if a child is being disruptive in class, the school will often end the class and have the non-disruptive children leave the classroom. It’s no surprise the same Democrats who are blocking the Legislature also don’t like a bill that will return safety, law and order to classrooms. We need testifiers on TUESDAY afternoon who will let the committee know that classroom safety is an important issue. You can also submit online comments for the committee hearing prior to noon on Feb. 27th by clicking . Establishing Justice and Insuring the Domestic Tranquility Chief Justice Heavican gave his ‘State of the State’ Justice report to the Unicameral. The message was clear. The first two goals in the Preamble of the Constitution need work. Like most businesses and departments, the judicial system is suffering from staffing shortages. The need for more personnel and new prison facilities was highlighted in the speech. Pay was recently increased and a new prison needed to house violent offenders is on the docket to be passed and approved by the legislature. The business of protecting the public from violent offenders by authorizing a new prison is in jeopardy due to the actions of the Central Omaha Democrat Senators. In addition, the Chief Justice touched on the mental health problems plaguing our system. The party has been supportive of the mental health emphasis as we understand the problems this unaddressed issue is having on the entire system. We need to address these critical needs in our justice department to continue to ensure domestic tranquility, provide the common defense, and establish justice in Nebraska. Taxes Plans continue to move forward on significant tax relief. The Revenue Department reiterated their revenue forecasts. Their forecast of strong revenue continues to enable the plans for tax relief by the body. Friday will be the hearings for the EPIC Consumption Tax . A resolution to support the EPIC tax plan was presented at the SCC meeting in Elkhorn on Jan. 21st and was adopted by the NEGOP governing body by a vote of 77-38. In support of this resolution, we will continue to educate and promote this groundbreaking tax plan which can permanently address the problems of high taxes, exemptions for strong lobbying groups, and property tax carve-out plaguing the politically connected developers. A freer economy, lower taxes, and equality under the law for all developers will be the benefit. Infrastructure Senator Moser introduced with the strong support of the Governor to authorize $450 million in bonds to expedite the completion of highways across Nebraska. In addition, the bill delays sunset dates for bonds and increased amounts to be used for annual debt service. The state party emphasized “Building a Premier Infrastructure System including roads, bridges, pipelines, and broadband” in August 2022. We support this bill to achieve this plank in our legislative plan. Election Integrity upcoming week will help set the future direction of this state in elections. Senator Erdman’s bill on Voter ID will be heard on Wednesday. The state party has been intimately involved in many of the clauses of these bills. This opportunity to drastically alter the security of elections in Nebraska is because of the amazing work done by the NEGOP Legislative Committee and the Legislative Plan adopted in August of 2022. The leaders of the NEGOP listened to the membership, honored our constitution and completed the work of the Legislative Plan, built the relationship with Senators to advance common-sense legislation and we are very close to securing a component of our election process. Thank you, to all who have been a part of this process. BUT...we need you there to testify on Wednesday, March 1st to change the trajectory of the security of our elections at the public hearing. As usual, the Democrats are looking to sidestep the State Constitution and argue that Voter ID does not have to happen if the legislature cannot agree to the rules. It is time we uphold the Constitution and advance true election integrity. Rules In summary, a lot of excellent legislative work is on the table to move the general welfare of this state forward while reinforcing individual rights and enabling the goal of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for Nebraskans. This work is being stonewalled by Democrats. At this time, we will reprint the often overlooked part of the legislative plan the governing body of the party passed in Hastings on August 2022. Rules are needed to advance the common sense agenda of Nebraskans forward. We believe the effect of delaying the decision to debate the rules is now coming home to roost. Often overlooked because of its lack of “Hot Topic” material, ‘rules’ may have been the most important part of the plan to enable progress at the Unicameral. We reprint this legislative plank unedited for your benefit below. MODERNIZE NEBRASKA LEGISLATIVE RULES TO REFLECT “WE THE PEOPLE” The Nebraska Unicameral has been plagued by outdated rules and procedures that do not reflect the values and needs of its citizens. As a result, a small group of senators can block legislation desired by an overwhelming majority of Nebraska families and communities. It is way overdue for legislators to change their procedural rules so beneficial legislation may become law. • Require open and transparent senator votes when electing legislative committee chairs • Reduce the cloture vote requirement so that 17 senators cannot block legislation • Make the Unicameral a partisan body so voters know their senator’s party allegiance • Make available online video recordings of all floor debates and hearings within 24 hours • Require all legislative fiscal notes are publicly available three days prior to a hearing. Encourage your Senators to address the rules so that these radical Democrats from Omaha don’t stop the progress of the state. Until next week... We need your donations to continue to provide this level of advocacy and education. Our Nebraska Republican Legislative efforts need citizen support and we encourage you to become a monthly donor to the NEGOP to help advocate for commonsense policies across our state. Help us create a critical mass to get these bills across the finish line. We need you engaged! Todd WatsonNEGOP Political DirectorPolitical@ne.gop | | | | | Legislative Tool for Submitting an Online Comment Video Tutorial: William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTYThis email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508 | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . body:

| | We have some good news and some bad news. **The good news is:** We just won _critical_ special elections in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Hampshire this year, securing victories for state Democrats who will protect abortion access, democracy, and more. **The bad news is:** With Republicans doing everything they can to avenge their November losses and special elections being more costly than ever before, we can't sustain this level of investment in critical races without a surge of donor support. **We’re reaching out because if every grassroots Democrat reading this email chips in anything they can spare today, we will have a fighting chance to compete against the GOP and their massive spending – especially right now, with a group of generous donors matching every dollar 3-to-1 before our end-of-month deadline!** [Will you step up and donate $7, $25, or whatever you can to elect state Democrats in upcoming special elections? The good news is: We just won critical special elections in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Hampshire this year, securing victories for state Democrats who will protect abortion access, democracy, and more. name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $10 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Tuesday? When you do,you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. | |
---
I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! **As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal.** We cannot let that happen again, Derek: _They missed their goal last month._ Tuesday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. clean_body: As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. | | I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. We cannot let that happen again, Derek: They missed their goal last month. Tuesday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $10 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Tuesday? When you do, you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. ** Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: Democrats defied the odds in 2022. Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. But know this: There are still fights ahead. Extreme Republicans like Donald Trump and Nikki Haley have already announced they’re running for president, and we can expect even more MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that means closing the DNC’s February fundraising gap ASAP. Thanks for stepping up, James James Carville Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Notice: ARW will NOT meet on March 2, 2023
body:
NO March meeting at Redrock | | | |

#
**Active Republican Women**
**Dear fellow Republicans,**
As we move forward to reorganize the club and find a new focus,
ARW will NOT meet on
March 2, 2023.

Your understanding and patience are greatly appreciated. More information coming soon!

Thank You!

name: American Defense News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf0giuq09qfcm41f6joje0mm2l0msnrnanhaoaug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm55c6071kleklaaa187bqi0na901h0qj1rjejao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj2cph2bs)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgr65nu53g87gb7fii9dlrr172tjapscahrmh1gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj2cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zujqqhr82k6gl2cokp7ncdsklhskrm21l7ehnd88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6e2vjmkb0i3n47vatg89760i1orlqpiit43a08_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj4c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zctspd3bb8ge0oii5lnit6349trt246tnl9b11b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj4c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8o6c6mspngqminji06rhlj218damfmic186a87g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj4c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sean Feucht
subject: A walkthrough our distribution operation in Turkey
body:
Here is a behind-the-scenes look at our resource distribution operation currently underway in Turkey.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmjj13pekv1iil322vvo1m58b7c6ghol65k81ht8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Here is a behind-the-scenes look at our resource distribution operation currently underway in Turkey. This is one of our stations distributing essentials like shampoo, soap, lotion, wipes, toothbrushes, toilet paper, and so much more. During Jesus's ministry, He preached, but He also met their needs. Sight was restored, the lame could walk, and bleeding was healed-- we are just trying to meet the needs of hurting people in Turkey.

Take a trip through our distribution operation by watching the video below. If you would like to contribute to the response and restoration effort, you can do so by clicking the button below.

name: ICYMI News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvvdn3ra6hb0003gt2g056nn8glooisi3imma0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl5b4rp1ma0i5ls7262nkoevkmtha6eji7tl8080_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)****[”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjtvnjkf4n7440efsbhiistcod38518ekgnort9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0lc24cujkmfjljjqnrk4h14b9r6nvhcspatvc98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5egik3s87404i0dst9k90r69pjp8c0ubkrsnqf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2oqgh6ibb9jacu6s556v0h07655f6080miurclg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj0c3h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: American Briefing
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z364lrpsde0b1bm958ka4524ia060oddhj9doif0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaetcf7g5uck1ga5gutl7oi85pkvkatfub6fpng0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj1c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3civln36b8ujdd02f8tcsjh7g7a5eavl5biph0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5g69oj1c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: American Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650364%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vjwjf%2blARrnC6sREYKalrg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qmumk%2bdkfAs250CJH55bhg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650376%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=69RxdHiVdgN1d%2bsrhQMbWQ&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650377%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MOQuP5tcjgBxGWgLQHh0KQ&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650378%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1OTCsL6VjB8TNhzV4unKzA&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1646%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=c%2fYgizGo7oj8bbSTIelldA&sysid=1)_

|
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1646%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=c%2fYgizGo7oj8bbSTIelldA&sysid=1)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Before the weekend ends: fighting racism
body:
It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49n1giitlpr013qf0tt8gpjk9ev026s7e40r1b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

Friend,

It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_"**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others."_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like:

_**" We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population."**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpf3b42lih0ggrsd7q9542dttp579i14n0h9jjj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zugkec8qm3jmqttjq331okv59iaq7bppec9ljopo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ns3lbl17573do7c9132kl7ufi3opiot83ocva8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z227q5tgba9l4fslh2nqurnvssgo5a6k0631gqjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2428j89k1plrhephbvn7mj44ccudoi0it7aatig_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu8q4i1gsgv52e761jo63br5ppd2bbijivl2vqa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0e0cqomui6cp2e8h1m4bhpf5pc85l9ugcais28_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zai4clivi1bicfp4rk43rtqo7ejidqdcm67scidg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zke2bc3mm46guor720npqu5ku3sgo0nue40q7rb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zviq5sekp3ftc5fh1fhgtsldob96l0qv43ll7p1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76cdh2bs)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Here’s why abortion is pushed in Black communities
body:
It’s funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6w0h%2fVtxn1%2fOUABQZ9bRWg&sysid=1)

Friend,

It’s funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it’s hard to ignore Sanger’s racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_“**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others.”_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it’s hard to explain away quotes like:

_**“We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population.”**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6w0h%2fVtxn1%2fOUABQZ9bRWg&sysid=1)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I’ve set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650372%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PbtTAmMLrLvSyAdT2hv4sA&sysid=1)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn’t an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650373%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tt%2b%2bfQ71xI%2frODB0hC2CkA&sysid=1)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America’s minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650374%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lWlwBe8d7C5dDgNLOP3Etw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fnrUM5zsnhA1%2bjivtyyJ7w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650386%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=metANI8oA7V2Qsg%2f3mTFzA&sysid=1)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities: 79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women. Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies. Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half. Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans. Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn’t an accident or a sickness. Abortion is murder. I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end. BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual. We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities. By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America’s minority communities. Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands. With your help, BLEXIT can put an end to abortion in Black communities. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: A free video series about the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7si8ud185f1upn49753hvduahlp8l78gpp611r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zslt8vfsjc562qnohlru7gcph47ic8rfnmqulc8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76c3h2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zin1t2gau2ou9pq8o8be02ptptqekm2bujevctu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76c3h2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zffe36k02sfrkfu648b3dgo7m2krdjskae73p838_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76c3h2bs)**

---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znf76qs3pggmmjeorj32nc8tq3g3opprj3jbgm80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i64o76c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08842%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wa%2f4W3APHn7wXTynF%2fmLqg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fXM%2feGWxdPE6iTdbmQp8Eg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fXM%2feGWxdPE6iTdbmQp8Eg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7166%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=OpfIngh1MDqqpNoHIep24w&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7166%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=OpfIngh1MDqqpNoHIep24w&sysid=1)
