name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Hungry for a cause
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This dream has always stuck with me.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zacv44oskllggl3rpv1g9kjijjv8q5pls3qllfs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsfrme1d6nl7kr7q8inaubobmnh8rkvvjg7dkdv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkt1em392a5a7nr2rrmbn9oo4h5a586g218kume0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8i7eudssfrn56pe2ect3vcbl1hq279k9fp1vn58_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrn0oi26h14fo753dt3h96803n4ivlmjm7fi77oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fdqlh4r6baqgjtf2qgpiv2a7pen74e4igrr90o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7aom0p2cvsgt9ueqp92v6ep3au8nkhlh3rn0kao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0ler1l0lii8g40rroqd2irb027j57ucp8v9gr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ocb1cgnbj7e94knjism5td5d36r0ohkln237g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob6clh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjsatmcoi5q106oro7igcjira7morjkotfhdn7i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3bsv07g825l9njh4gn4sv2ja8541ofe5lm31k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo3re9ir7j57jdfm8enn0u3oquajjvmloklh6vl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0gsluacdav6ejonsseksr5nffibcrr8hgdnhn1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcqlt7u0rttv024tmfkr0hba3ikovieqeo51ckog_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zubgtrd1gildd8jbb1hg4orkrsrljdotchjlpc20).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbfmlh8pg0n79r8v9q37ae809lr8t0sgmesci4r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5i66ob1chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650393%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=od3cRlHHFHNHlIKAmM8x7g&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650394%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nsHq9RXVKEFNJWzCjGD90A&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650305%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7si2o62IvfTAUt2KbZSiwA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650306%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r0QLgvod3U55F8uNmpc41g&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Hey -

Thought you’d want to know...

Due to an **accidental overstock** in their warehouse...

My friends are doing a “Last Minute Giveaway” and **[giving out their extremely popular Mil Spec Tactical Watches FREE today.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11705/6374453/9ac1f5bde846aac74bccacbf9d4e690985b12cc9/f728914f7bced73a62d7076e770995a83b021d95)**

Normally these sell for USD99...

But today, they’re handing out 100 of them at no-cost to clear space for new inventory.

This watch is the ** _perfect “everyday carry”..._**

\- Water and impact resistant \- Built-in, 3-meter “lifeline band” of paracord \- Emergency whistle \- Foolproof and durable compass \- Ambient temperature gauge
Like I said, they’re **available FREE today** – until their overstock is cleared out.

That could happen any time though.

And I’m told there are ** _only 100 left_** to give out.

So don’t dilly dally.

**[Click here to get your FREE Mil Spec Tactical Watch](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11705/6374453/9ac1f5bde846aac74bccacbf9d4e690985b12cc9/f728914f7bced73a62d7076e770995a83b021d95)** – before someone else does.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Activist doctors are harming our children
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I recently announced on _Tucker Carlson Tonight_ that we're suing the activist doctors and hospitals of medical giant, Kaiser Permanente, **and I need your immediate help**. Specifically, I'm asking you to support our groundbreaking lawsuit on behalf of Chloe Cole - an innocent and healthy girl who was turned into a lifelong medical patient by Kaiser Permanente, who decided to start "transitioning" her from female to male when she was just 13 years old. These doctors and hospitals who abuse children to advance a twisted agenda must be stopped before one more child is put under their knives and experimented on. **Making monsters like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll stop this barbaric practice.** [**That 's why I'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation to the case's legal fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366143:6b_4ucGsN:m:1:3331421248:84EF540148149B925F22C41E453F2301:r) Chloe was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente's multi-billion-dollar cottage industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy.
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | **They destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to other children across America.** With your help today, our case can help stop this madness. We MUST set a loud and clear legal precedent before their predatory movement goes any further. Because the radical Left not only supports these grotesque sex-change surgeries for children... they want them to be taxpayer funded in every state... Make no mistake: winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. On her own, Chloe would never have the resources to battle a giant like Kaiser Permanente. But battles like hers are why I started this non-profit, the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts for American values and bringing together talented lawyers who are ready to fight and people like Chloe who have nowhere else to turn. **But we don 't have the big money that our opponents have.** [**That 's why I need you to click this link right now to give a generous, tax-deductible donation to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366143:6b_4ucGsN:m:1:3331421248:84EF540148149B925F22C41E453F2301:r) If you can donate today - please do so. Click one of these buttons below to give your best possible donation to support Chloe and the Center for American Liberty win this historic and critical lawsuit against radical medical professionals victimizing vulnerable children:
---
| | [**DONATE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366143:6b_4ucGsN:m:1:3331421248:84EF540148149B925F22C41E453F2301:r)
---

This will be a long and expensive fight, but together, I know we can win.

Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I recently announced on Tucker Carlson Tonight that we're suing the activist doctors and hospitals of medical giant, Kaiser Permanente, and I need your immediate help. Specifically, I'm asking you to support our groundbreaking lawsuit on behalf of Chloe Cole - an innocent and healthy girl who was turned into a lifelong medical patient by Kaiser Permanente, who decided to start "transitioning" her from female to male when she was just 13 years old. These doctors and hospitals who abuse children to advance a twisted agenda must be stopped before one more child is put under their knives and experimented on. Making monsters like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll stop this barbaric practice. Chloe was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente's multi-billion-dollar cottage industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy. | | She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | They destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to other children across America. With your help today, our case can help stop this madness. We MUST set a loud and clear legal precedent before their predatory movement goes any further. Because the radical Left not only supports these grotesque sex-change surgeries for children... they want them to be taxpayer funded in every state... Make no mistake: winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. On her own, Chloe would never have the resources to battle a giant like Kaiser Permanente. But battles like hers are why I started this non-profit, the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts for American values and bringing together talented lawyers who are ready to fight and people like Chloe who have nowhere else to turn. But we don 't have the big money that our opponents have.** If you can donate today - please do so. Click one of these buttons below to give your best possible donation to support Chloe and the Center for American Liberty win this historic and critical lawsuit against radical medical professionals victimizing vulnerable children: | | This will be a long and expensive fight, but together, I know we can win. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO Center for American Liberty | | | P.S. YOU can stop the doctors and hospitals who irreversibly harm vulnerable children in the name of "gender affirming care" by giving a generous tax-deductible donation to our legal fund. The success of our lawsuit - Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente - depends on us banding together to stop this barbaric treatment. Thank you! | | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. Last November, this grassroots team overcame the odds to reelect strong Democratic leaders in Virginia like Reps. Jennifer Wexton and Abigail Spanberger, while _holding and expanding_ the Democratic majority in the Senate. **Now, Republicans are ready to retaliate.** They’re already working around the clock to defeat us next November and capture Tim Kaine’s seat and flip the Senate. _[**So we’re asking: Will you help us hit the ground running and split a donation of $5 or more between Senator Warner and Senator Kaine so we can hit our February goal and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59292087/393776641/-1137220044?refcode=mw_em_230226_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQ4NDdjNC1lZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=klUdRIb1TBAo7OdUz13tbZPCzEhTPsdc7IhGqWcSxdA=)_ This is a crucial election – one that could determine if we maintain our Democratic majority in the Senate. An election that could determine the future of access to the full range of reproductive care, climate change, and the right to vote. We can’t allow the GOP to roll back all the progress Senator Warner and Senator Kaine have fought for. _[**We have a path to victory, but we need your help. Join us in our work to reelect Senator Kaine by chipping in anything you can afford before our end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59292088/393776642/-1137220044?refcode=mw_em_230226_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQ4NDdjNC1lZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=klUdRIb1TBAo7OdUz13tbZPCzEhTPsdc7IhGqWcSxdA=)_ Thank you for your constant support. Friend,

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bdf92fc224a4d5e83a83f8bdb82b8a5&_e=Sc5neB8EcYKstuEY13esHaza2nlf9cb0EvBUvuZJOsJdVLYFcE59SJ3MKgFS3s60fTXg1ec-b54xdczK6ZQBmTSulJRi6BvdKXK1HBA58s_vSppo73krlb43Wp1dC36NvD1D304dp_Zp9y4Va2hCMVjUT1IcY98kFogRy8nC2TWgtPxV9WtNA0etG7Aw3zTZ4HmKZx3TQgBR4uyFdJd-VTRz___rgOcdiYpMAlnZOwzYE6-0R1Kz8__NUxdOnU68cFPCnrObeS9gMEKhpIvfgdmJQkWHUjQ5uD7MMBVG_9MlD1p1SWaqy1KU7vsowXr_vDUeTL_NhaYFbaVwfShjIERTh5iW3jwpcGwUBr3XQJzs3jj_oGY2RcZU4T6cgYEt1c1jTUQhR8PtOhpMYzL7JQ%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bdf92fc224a4d5e83a83f8bdb82b8a5&_e=Sc5neB8EcYKstuEY13esHaza2nlf9cb0EvBUvuZJOsJdVLYFcE59SJ3MKgFS3s60fTXg1ec-b54xdczK6ZQBmTSulJRi6BvdKXK1HBA58s_vSppo73krlb43Wp1dC36NvD1D304dp_Zp9y4Va2hCMVjUT1IcY98kFogRy8nC2TWgtPxV9WtNA0etG7Aw3zTZ4HmKZx3TQgBR4uyFdJd-VTRz___rgOcdiYpMAlnZOwzYE6-0R1Kz8__NUxdOnU686nNJ63n05Gv1d3gWzrXfZG95aA7Je15iyExnWTY7v1APvN9ufCxk87b3WRN8vObqZQJjbFu3jMP4mDBw14iNB8Z4nHEcZenvxSBAE9UP9A4ePslJE8b6aOo-SBhpbU3GjagsJ_mT6Qwk8HGqOl3xZw%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bdf92fc224a4d5e83a83f8bdb82b8a5&_e=Sc5neB8EcYKstuEY13esHaza2nlf9cb0EvBUvuZJOsJdVLYFcE59SJ3MKgFS3s60fTXg1ec-b54xdczK6ZQBmTSulJRi6BvdKXK1HBA58s_vSppo73krlb43Wp1dC36NvD1D304dp_Zp9y4Va2hCMVjUT1IcY98kFogRy8nC2TWgtPxV9WtNA0etG7Aw3zTZ4HmKZx3TQgBR4uyFdJd-VTRz___rgOcdiYpMAlnZOwzYE6-0R1Kz8__NUxdOnU68HkzX6dLr9MNFm5mrCicpooiRp6v7S_C37GjUdR87f2-oeS8zdSJk6XbIE3P0ArWijezHoPaX9t2b6bRX8XMJgIrv7QM1zl0kgPC58iX657lDsQZcIJMcOtbYtBm7q_aeanU_AfDph4PuhY9ztIMY2A%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bdf92fc224a4d5e83a83f8bdb82b8a5&_e=Sc5neB8EcYKstuEY13esHaza2nlf9cb0EvBUvuZJOsJdVLYFcE59SJ3MKgFS3s60fTXg1ec-b54xdczK6ZQBmTSulJRi6BvdKXK1HBA58s_vSppo73krlb43Wp1dC36NvD1D304dp_Zp9y4Va2hCMVjUT1IcY98kFogRy8nC2TWgtPxV9WtNA0etG7Aw3zTZ4HmKZx3TQgBR4uyFdJd-VTRz___rgOcdiYpMAlnZOwzYE6-0R1Kz8__NUxdOnU68D9N2xrdMGnAM4Au1CUS5YnAMRKpZwN5f4DKQHtkOQziXRJI7CCzd560Oi06W_uBRr-4avXKbK96N-HkqdElPflJ5J3yjVITM6wLa_8jgQl0uhL0P3rUR_gqadVCsQhn_jCCiSyWOtVFMFq6VPNjR4Q%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1bdf92fc224a4d5e83a83f8bdb82b8a5&_e=Sc5neB8EcYKstuEY13esHaza2nlf9cb0EvBUvuZJOsJdVLYFcE59SJ3MKgFS3s60fTXg1ec-b54xdczK6ZQBmTSulJRi6BvdKXK1HBA58s_vSppo73krlb43Wp1dC36NvD1D304dp_Zp9y4Va2hCMVjUT1IcY98kFogRy8nC2TWgtPxV9WtNA0etG7Aw3zTZ4HmKZx3TQgBR4uyFdJd-VTRz___rgOcdiYpMAlnZOwzYE6-0R1Kz8__NUxdOnU68bilVNwq-VEC1xKytEaI08bZnxvpyiawdZ3CqHBss9YJtrJqsJTwaGFcO2lptG5U1ARBGovlymGOSRTzgUviRCdTTVh6YB3XTe6taBjJ7V-78syklvr0Dt5zIYOLQx3AOToWt5g8KFxZNPOOTXF__eg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0df006cd394441dd9e5ca693584da966&_e=QIIbh3TsyonfyKcyYtO21qhJMDD6bicdvFbUTuVqFQhGkIZJdK8a53bVify9vlHad-qjYcuNfg1qSFOy1KeDYxoLSv0WeeXfq_rkeuBUSq2yQy5PZh9JybM_54o83SqrI8aISEaSFwvUizbSj2ouRf6DdhOH96NJPTCwskBjuAIU_bHZVJDgrZYtWuToV1dEVIz4x1mI11xTiUa9owosHLQOw0wuBz-Hh8T3KByrvCmf37R1PfYM_HZ4f7FtJNSJg9x2edK58QhSAhL6oJL5daoiWG4wxrSPOd9s9SE66vQjcl7LouF6yXFwbxJADbhDC1HGxvHmEFQIarr4OAY1eC2z4PTVRyb2Wemox72n2A2RqrpzJCFTe3y06m-YPaeeodwYEeI5fgGoPMxK_5K41g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0df006cd394441dd9e5ca693584da966&_e=QIIbh3TsyonfyKcyYtO21qhJMDD6bicdvFbUTuVqFQhGkIZJdK8a53bVify9vlHad-qjYcuNfg1qSFOy1KeDYxoLSv0WeeXfq_rkeuBUSq2yQy5PZh9JybM_54o83SqrI8aISEaSFwvUizbSj2ouRf6DdhOH96NJPTCwskBjuAIU_bHZVJDgrZYtWuToV1dEVIz4x1mI11xTiUa9owosHLQOw0wuBz-Hh8T3KByrvCm7haIFVpKwiUH4Es0url9iwPJ4ClOamLebyplYe8J65BHozIuH1sBiGVgFAccWP25_hjfz4rXvmQxDxCTCQuSOkFo-WwL_1EAxVystDOXJI9msjmrUdu5lW_A-N6i1jOIwoRXIIkOaxTYUkTJ4OEa-wIdHlYpvQNw44bsJShbMRA%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0df006cd394441dd9e5ca693584da966&_e=QIIbh3TsyonfyKcyYtO21qhJMDD6bicdvFbUTuVqFQhGkIZJdK8a53bVify9vlHad-qjYcuNfg1qSFOy1KeDYxoLSv0WeeXfq_rkeuBUSq2yQy5PZh9JybM_54o83SqrI8aISEaSFwvUizbSj2ouRf6DdhOH96NJPTCwskBjuAIU_bHZVJDgrZYtWuToV1dEVIz4x1mI11xTiUa9owosHLQOw0wuBz-Hh8T3KByrvClAhwZ1N0BbOBr3D2rTDJ152zI-QTQeadL-OdkHgj_jFfMj4TFdfNYIwbjIIgZM_YWkvtzXiHpCz76sUDasSI0sYorTMIZW3OpPC4ldKiIpVJpq7WdiDk0-01fEx7kWVni6z-02tjqRVfTlxPuHJU2tcGe0O1VU0Pgbi9-Gd4z2Bg%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Sen. Jon Tester
subject: You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293014/393779611/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxOTE0ZS1lZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71FPvuS59HshAsPpqkrmcj1Yl6eboPwqOhnnFtb0pKM=)
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained T-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state across the country.**
[**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293015/393779612/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxOTE0ZS1lZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71FPvuS59HshAsPpqkrmcj1Yl6eboPwqOhnnFtb0pKM=)

You don’t need 10 fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,
Jon

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293020/393779617/1575385346?refcode=jtk3966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxOTE0ZS1lZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71FPvuS59HshAsPpqkrmcj1Yl6eboPwqOhnnFtb0pKM=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293021/393779618/1575385346?refcode=jtk3966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxOTE0ZS1lZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71FPvuS59HshAsPpqkrmcj1Yl6eboPwqOhnnFtb0pKM=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293022/393779619/1575385346?refcode=jtk3966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxOTE0ZS1lZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71FPvuS59HshAsPpqkrmcj1Yl6eboPwqOhnnFtb0pKM=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
Our County Chairs have been doing everything they can to protect our state from extremism.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CrUnG33TU-jrqrpiEbx8BxQRLnu3B2D76N6WbK2EpDo=/yceNTeIFWmcCIfaRiaHJu7wD772nPuwLJCkBWHuz_Gk=?refcode=EM_FR_230226EOM1_DK_90DO_3_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats --

Illinois' 2023 Consolidated General Elections are in just over a month, and early voting has already begun.

Our County Chairs have been on the front lines for months, doing everything in their power to protect our state from the extremists running in this year's elections.

Their tireless work has set us up to stop extremism in its tracks and make real progress in Illinois this April.

**[But to finish the job, we need to act fast and ramp up these efforts before it's too late. With just over a month until Election Day, will you donate $10 right now to help us meet our $2,000 end-of-month goal before Tuesday's deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/CrUnG33TU-jrqrpiEbx8BxQRLnu3B2D76N6WbK2EpDo=/yceNTeIFWmcCIfaRiaHJu7wD772nPuwLJCkBWHuz_Gk=?refcode=EM_FR_230226EOM1_DK_90DO_3_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**

Patriot, My message is clear and simple: **NO MORE OIL to Communist China!** I'm proud to be leading the charge, alongside West Virginia Democrat Joe Manchin, to build a bipartisan coalition to stop the Biden administration from shipping one more drop from our nation's oil reserve to our nation's greatest advisory. Senate Republicans are all-in and we have FIVE Democrat cosponsors on the Cruz-Manchin Protecting America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act!**
** **I shared more on this important legislation on one of the latest episodes of _Verdict_. **

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Before the weekend ends: fighting racism
body:
It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27031996fbc94e4398575fe6c302c9f1&_e=klExotfQyuQv29PdbZ7SaOwSUcAzty1vSOBTOLO_uzcJgWmWuisvV2gjn3qwt4h0Tqt1y0FRxDkq1pDK0tn5ai2iyXqVWish6bXIU6Lno6KKqeH0YuaKmv3Mguy3v2TJAEwnkzzUMPaK-dc7b_AMBO5FvZivGM8YvJScR0yyOacO0fHi9hBUmZWfKlZnkad1KYE0wmFIE56lf1NOt3FgLFIdhbLq-ba_v-NFyOuTGn3ComcgF49UhHXagNOngw_BkAcoUYzkJ_BzirMZgdqt1JMdPVKH9ZUTtWlqWgM2Nck%3D)

Friend,

It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_"**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others."_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like:

_**" We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population."**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27031996fbc94e4398575fe6c302c9f1&_e=klExotfQyuQv29PdbZ7SaOwSUcAzty1vSOBTOLO_uzcJgWmWuisvV2gjn3qwt4h0Tqt1y0FRxDkq1pDK0tn5ai2iyXqVWish6bXIU6Lno6KKqeH0YuaKmv3Mguy3v2TJAEwnkzzUMPaK-dc7b_AMBH-b7-D1n4V28lotH_mpgwarQyM0n58aTQ8Nz48-v7S1W8pbr-_r1YEVWduuBfN-fOokX42W8zUe7mj8hdFvy-oclxUv3-o9T0JWnW38552FW5UEsQzJsOP23wwHLlnWr8NTrpMLRGWc5SKag8b2fYw%3D)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27031996fbc94e4398575fe6c302c9f1&_e=klExotfQyuQv29PdbZ7SaOwSUcAzty1vSOBTOLO_uzcJgWmWuisvV2gjn3qwt4h0Tqt1y0FRxDkq1pDK0tn5ai2iyXqVWish6bXIU6Lno6KKqeH0YuaKmv3Mguy3v2TJAEwnkzzUMPaK-dc7b_AMBBlmwUEQjqVGVmEgFMgO3W3jQDGqCCLqupIb7mBdB9kZeYFiHc_DRqEWScV5yZg2ZmDdb64gO47LjOKSxNaN34OjZfNOXHHB_d972dZgu95hdZHu-kclnilnCOERRab2LglbO1WRbugJMBO04TEl5L4%3D)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27031996fbc94e4398575fe6c302c9f1&_e=klExotfQyuQv29PdbZ7SaOwSUcAzty1vSOBTOLO_uzcJgWmWuisvV2gjn3qwt4h0Tqt1y0FRxDkq1pDK0tn5ai2iyXqVWish6bXIU6Lno6KKqeH0YuaKmv3Mguy3v2TJAEwnkzzUMPaK-dc7b_AMBI0DsSHEVNs8aTf0iRFFiNBNB035u-3TU14G74RHq5StvctOopryTkRph0WBL5lj1VXWUo4u1FH4aWXAi0_NxxS0skBDOotfPUtaYI5JQnsT_AbMSN6QoBeOEuV1MOilEsBAaOAOfAAi2RZeanlm2h4%3D)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27031996fbc94e4398575fe6c302c9f1&_e=klExotfQyuQv29PdbZ7SaOwSUcAzty1vSOBTOLO_uzcJgWmWuisvV2gjn3qwt4h0Tqt1y0FRxDkq1pDK0tn5ai2iyXqVWish6bXIU6Lno6KKqeH0YuaKmv3Mguy3v2TJAEwnkzzUMPaK-dc7b_AMBBHt2YEUp3SW3QtbclfPRJOOjU3jq5q9TEWscWxJ1iR9V9-A19YKT55bUJK64lZGK87HjcE3F0rq_urQwHEOkzCMFd9P_2UafhRsZS_88fPUQmygI4IFCT2ba5m3zpip12OplXo6rV0z1MMK1pTUnwk%3D)

I hope you know how hard House Democrats are working to deliver For The People and continue our march toward a more perfect union.

We will always put People Over Politics to make progress for everyday Americans – _but never bend the knee to an extreme MAGA Republican agenda._

Especially not when their agenda includes tax breaks for billionaires, cuts to Social Security and a nationwide abortion ban.

We will fight them every step of the way.

But, Peter – we must also do everything we can to take back the House.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. I hope you know how hard House Democrats are working to deliver For The People and continue our march toward a more perfect union. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2063cf090784f4e98133d66e25bb052&_e=lCrmPma22FrQoWnZ1K99nUxfF6Ufwx0K-FRQDmgDFw1i48gJxyZCW98nLfsgRe2UI_wMG38tiRoRQ05mqNW1LRWXLwNWRWxrRHntr-_py0AXXlrOhAJCxn_SJLl1zr8AS0zY-n6IVjw7ePV6N2q_crjFPDP61WwLZyC-wcUQDQfDowdJFBnqKBDVkTJMqlBANOtv3_8YZjoFtxh1r2xl9gLXI6-pVNpAwZv-QU5eErpW00M96_vkfL1GgYNBbpLSq3-ml6QWmgBeW6YR5Wv96PGvmgaGjjj_zA8WjctnswZMWu5s93HBRqgjHLqhiqm6lIC5xhyno6a4rNCmU7G2yeG4mADjsV6LFJnLvIJYByHYRZIJaiWblgMQgNMF6a0oFB-wreAcv1EwMKOM2cpcPA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2063cf090784f4e98133d66e25bb052&_e=lCrmPma22FrQoWnZ1K99nUxfF6Ufwx0K-FRQDmgDFw1i48gJxyZCW98nLfsgRe2UI_wMG38tiRoRQ05mqNW1LRWXLwNWRWxrRHntr-_py0AXXlrOhAJCxn_SJLl1zr8AS0zY-n6IVjw7ePV6N2q_crjFPDP61WwLZyC-wcUQDQfDowdJFBnqKBDVkTJMqlBANOtv3_8YZjoFtxh1r2xl9gLXI6-pVNpAwZv-QU5eErqq1RGUQ6SkLTz90wzMBPkQSd330qdnB2VOm3rfgVXVMWwsYG8tSUJF1OtGVsf7tO1p43T3saulPYgk7qLN-Y9rYoTSAHVtxqh-LGLas1YWQBZpvBmchncIy_JEcyDoecf6c1pOQGsppj4-QTn4iwV_EMjJkwkWuOv0JlAbgrgp1w%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2063cf090784f4e98133d66e25bb052&_e=lCrmPma22FrQoWnZ1K99nUxfF6Ufwx0K-FRQDmgDFw1i48gJxyZCW98nLfsgRe2UI_wMG38tiRoRQ05mqNW1LRWXLwNWRWxrRHntr-_py0AXXlrOhAJCxn_SJLl1zr8AS0zY-n6IVjw7ePV6N2q_crjFPDP61WwLZyC-wcUQDQfDowdJFBnqKBDVkTJMqlBANOtv3_8YZjoFtxh1r2xl9gLXI6-pVNpAwZv-QU5eErouIhsu2UUDDS7el7aM0v-ZZimTArvdEwtSGylRFyULfDsWZTIGjhK4Dpn0TDhNLNL2Mwb1vB2r1mrzQC8IiQf9zEByP1ppeiJZ0BPKQS7HrL4n9UsaA5k0IPXLSQ0Bs5WFwMEnjzHIHi_iokPi74ZyiDVJQUkr9QtsB-2YidBxtA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvm2u3fghk5qntkmlm12vofg4m27jm9lph0g25s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5j60o74c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm5k9k53cd2ensbke8j4ledqu3fagrmv62jq3mtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5j60o74c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zamrbkb63bbl31cpakt399512q4hvle0u0escok8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5j60o74c5h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk3a2uvebf44sash4f9kfg5898uoh9n23ghb2a98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5j60o74c5h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9c47ebl4si26kkk29oo2v16ndqohgn1tsonbj3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c5j60o74c5h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zt032tg71fvl6tdbsnf7jhijaa86gm2sg7a6t7bo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7qdfhapo54c4ur4l0gajfnouliml8n3dm6i0k48_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctgmco30shgm49fg)

| | | Trump gutted train safety rules during his administration, _**[including requirements for emergency braking.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T247e413a-feef-442f-b3be-78e08bd4afb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_And we saw the results with the recent disaster in East Palestine, Ohio. But then Trump had the nerve to visit there and complain about the very policies he himself implemented & eliminated! **And Trump even employed the "don't blame me, I'm an idiot" defense**, saying he never knew about the elimination of the emergency braking rule! [**Trump's foolishness not only likely helped cause the Ohio disaster, it has set us up for future disasters yet to come.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33e7fd94-d40f-4999-8496-8e0123c40d5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump needs to be held accountable. The least he can do is apologize to the people of East Palestine -- ideally on his way to prison. **[Tell Trump to Apologize for the Train Disaster in Ohio -- and admit he helped cause it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66cba503-3258-4a4d-b76b-9f989860af1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). **

name: Rethink! GOP
subject: Reminder: Introducing Rethink! GOP: The Largest Ballot Harvesting and Early Voting Initiative in the Nation
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | |
---
|
---
| Introducing Rethink! GOP: The Largest Ballot Harvesting and Early Voting Initiative in the Nation
---
| Dear Friend,
I am writing to introduce Rethink! GOP, a new nationwide super PAC that is focused on promoting early voting and ballot harvesting initiatives across the country. Our mission is to engage voters and ensure that their voices are heard in the upcoming elections.
Rethink! GOP is the largest initiative of its kind in the nation. Our team of experienced political operatives and campaign professionals is dedicated to making it easier for voters to participate in the democratic process, and we believe that our efforts can help drive turnout and make a meaningful impact in the upcoming election.

---
---
We are reaching out to you because we believe that you share our commitment to promoting civic engagement and supporting grassroots initiatives. We would be honored to have your support in our efforts to help more voters cast their ballots early and participate in the democratic process.
We believe that YOU will be critical to our overall success, and we are confident that with your support, we can make a real difference in 2024. We look forward to working with you to help promote early voting and ballot harvesting initiatives across the country.
Thank you for your time and consideration. We would be happy to provide you with more information about Rethink! GOP and our efforts to promote civic engagement and voter turnout.
Best regards,
Robert Duran IV National Executive Director, Rethink! GOP [RethinkGOP.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NQGKRiM-k36Ag_tlwjDZG8QHVrWIlm6ADsNnjJOJ_IeW0GaDtWIYPPK61S7r6obKURFL-FtLex9Rp_J_84g6Mhi_-l4Jsna0ps_sCVqb2yok3b_kwGOU2YZplM091s4-4MiN2A_4x3c_Njrq44Wpa4WUClP9uLINZWhPQLa0m0o3dDXsadsPCneUE3_gOtUDGzc-AJw7FDc=&c=9jp1hsy3Z54JhSZexaFEodZuzjwBv2M2Lv9o6igohM_iQX3Xy7WkHg==&ch=ZaSA9z1fxoW6jYHCUhsw9AoFlcSqc803FVB7DFQm4aSXWmQ2zdb9RA==)

subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. ---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=980b92ec726f4e3a9b7ea7691e81df1e&_e=SI2y0Uux7sAqAkqc-O7MCtExF3JXQn0a4psmN0ezPDbrfl3_XSEo7_iBfipsQx561xzvCLJqvaqfdCJudpSUJLbBgm49wJQOgPtuexfv73RDh61wuIpDn-Jucyg5pIzGrYnciMZtIdu3DlZbyERGF_ihvm5WWJYHXr5F1ELLBWnaInSwZ32xq-jRBIVOiDPe2v1vLcXI57wMeDhlu7oevVXhCilc4ragbY5iAGskwZWee2VS6SDAGwhf6hyQGxdkYdunY9nr-LD6Veo5xN4NI8TspH9bTA2FZBSfR5IjQ1jKO6azZeeaCBQevJqfDPqe) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=980b92ec726f4e3a9b7ea7691e81df1e&_e=SI2y0Uux7sAqAkqc-O7MCtExF3JXQn0a4psmN0ezPDbrfl3_XSEo7_iBfipsQx561xzvCLJqvaqfdCJudpSUJLbBgm49wJQOgPtuexfv73RDh61wuIpDn-Jucyg5pIzGrYnciMZtIdu3DlZbyERGF_ihvm5WWJYHXr5F1ELLBWkfgwzRvbQPQE9AMdB9aV8HOyzNsF4xyDLrF8CIeXQBy4kIxfu2nuXu3hNAMaq7wY_UHXOrhY_dy9ayIWfkg5hd4ZP3LddG0Xbc5JihbrVDeMBVPaN4xJwd8Atz3OwWy92L5EZplnQr6B7Ip-L6OINz)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=980b92ec726f4e3a9b7ea7691e81df1e&_e=SI2y0Uux7sAqAkqc-O7MCtExF3JXQn0a4psmN0ezPDbrfl3_XSEo7_iBfipsQx561xzvCLJqvaqfdCJudpSUJLbBgm49wJQOgPtuexfv73RDh61wuIpDn-Jucyg5pIzGrYnciMZtIdu3DlZbyERGF_ihvm5WWJYHXr5F1ELLBWkndB8qcPxp8rbpHxSLu_nnEZBpmGY5xg97krj7Qygm_0-gJie6-iQHECLjsA98ZD4cQyjU7ehV9INhbNYae_YjWK8LBQZOY_LjyUeYCVFKE5SSYlZwF0T2H-oSlswNf6SUAlW_9hX_IU1vrp1zrBho)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=980b92ec726f4e3a9b7ea7691e81df1e&_e=SI2y0Uux7sAqAkqc-O7MCtExF3JXQn0a4psmN0ezPDbrfl3_XSEo7_iBfipsQx561xzvCLJqvaqfdCJudpSUJLbBgm49wJQOgPtuexfv73RDh61wuIpDn-Jucyg5pIzGrYnciMZtIdu3DlZbyERGF_ihvm5WWJYHXr5F1ELLBWlq3_7K7MX65l-Qahgcl5UVNR9rEEOdmsMnUD6GywV1tPSM1jjvFUgRoGcWWUONprI-2pGsqnIGhD8SAJzImkfH8miZb3L2WknHlLSpvlwyGJvp6SDIwziiojZYvZ0v1W3BTRekxPpDWlKOuJZvQlhD)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=980b92ec726f4e3a9b7ea7691e81df1e&_e=SI2y0Uux7sAqAkqc-O7MCtExF3JXQn0a4psmN0ezPDbrfl3_XSEo7_iBfipsQx561xzvCLJqvaqfdCJudpSUJLbBgm49wJQOgPtuexfv73RDh61wuIpDn-Jucyg5pIzGrYnciMZtIdu3DlZbyERGF_ihvm5WWJYHXr5F1ELLBWlVUiCMxT9AsTzoaRMLUV6DXWs5K4zmztSTv_fiXpuoeyc_Cl1uja9PSPwme6xAbaqtkwICUZTJEcqza6M8qtxq9Oohneh_DF2wNjQdej_BwIZTYHrGSlO96ZLkW-CG9QJ1JUQDWpzWza9pVk2fEAHg)
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Suing Kaiser Permanente for abusing children
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I recently announced on _Tucker Carlson Tonight_ that we're suing the activist doctors and hospitals of medical giant, Kaiser Permanente, **and I need your immediate help**. Specifically, I'm asking you to support our groundbreaking lawsuit on behalf of Chloe Cole - an innocent and healthy girl who was turned into a lifelong medical patient by Kaiser Permanente, who decided to start "transitioning" her from female to male when she was just 13 years old. These doctors and hospitals who abuse children to advance a twisted agenda must be stopped before one more child is put under their knives and experimented on. **Making monsters like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll stop this barbaric practice.** [**That 's why I'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation to the case's legal fund.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62367743:6UOAocG0N:m:1:3366222934:E4E3210A9D972E2822487B4ED3B0462E:r) Chloe was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente's multi-billion-dollar cottage industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy.
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | **They destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to other children across America.** With your help today, our case can help stop this madness. We MUST set a loud and clear legal precedent before their predatory movement goes any further. Because the radical Left not only supports these grotesque sex-change surgeries for children... they want them to be taxpayer funded in every state... Make no mistake: winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. On her own, Chloe would never have the resources to battle a giant like Kaiser Permanente. But battles like hers are why I started this non-profit, the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts for American values and bringing together talented lawyers who are ready to fight and people like Chloe who have nowhere else to turn. **But we don 't have the big money that our opponents have.** [**That 's why I need you to click this link right now to give a generous, tax-deductible donation to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62367743:6UOAocG0N:m:1:3366222934:E4E3210A9D972E2822487B4ED3B0462E:r) If you can donate today - please do so. Click one of these buttons below to give your best possible donation to support Chloe and the Center for American Liberty win this historic and critical lawsuit against radical medical professionals victimizing vulnerable children:
---
| | [**DONATE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62367743:6UOAocG0N:m:1:3366222934:E4E3210A9D972E2822487B4ED3B0462E:r)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I recently announced on Tucker Carlson Tonight that we're suing the activist doctors and hospitals of medical giant, Kaiser Permanente, and I need your immediate help. Specifically, I'm asking you to support our groundbreaking lawsuit on behalf of Chloe Cole - an innocent and healthy girl who was turned into a lifelong medical patient by Kaiser Permanente, who decided to start "transitioning" her from female to male when she was just 13 years old. These doctors and hospitals who abuse children to advance a twisted agenda must be stopped before one more child is put under their knives and experimented on. Making monsters like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll stop this barbaric practice. Chloe was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente's multi-billion-dollar cottage industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy. | | She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | They destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to other children across America. With your help today, our case can help stop this madness. We MUST set a loud and clear legal precedent before their predatory movement goes any further. Because the radical Left not only supports these grotesque sex-change surgeries for children... they want them to be taxpayer funded in every state... Make no mistake: winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. On her own, Chloe would never have the resources to battle a giant like Kaiser Permanente. But battles like hers are why I started this non-profit, the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts for American values and bringing together talented lawyers who are ready to fight and people like Chloe who have nowhere else to turn. But we don 't have the big money that our opponents have.** If you can donate today - please do so. Click one of these buttons below to give your best possible donation to support Chloe and the Center for American Liberty win this historic and critical lawsuit against radical medical professionals victimizing vulnerable children: | | This will be a long and expensive fight, but together, I know we can win. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO Center for American Liberty | | | P.S. YOU can stop the doctors and hospitals who irreversibly harm vulnerable children in the name of "gender affirming care" by giving a generous tax-deductible donation to our legal fund. The success of our lawsuit - Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente - depends on us banding together to stop this barbaric treatment. name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Climate displacement grows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We can work together to protect our homes, the planet, and its people.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59300398/393804470/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230226-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1MzY1MDA4LTA4YjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e5Wq-jstX5PkEbIGalpxvypkeMmrxwzZnx8xhIND4Kg=)
---
| **A staggering 200 million people will be displaced in the next 20 years, climate experts warn.**

_**This is scary.**_

As catastrophic climate disasters become more and more frequent, displacement due to loss of homes, land, and livelihoods is rapidly growing. **More than 11 million people have lost their homes every year over the last 5 years because of extreme weather.**

We don’t have time to sit back and watch as the most vulnerable populations are in distress. We are fighting like hell to elect climate champions across the country.
