name: Andy Kim
subject: Politicians and judges don’t belong in these conversations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Since the Supreme Court struck down Roe last summer, states across the country have cut off access to reproductive care and have criminalized doctors. In Congress, anti-choice members have been working to ban abortion nationwide. Right-wing extremists have set our country on a dangerous path by eliminating the federal right to choose.

Now a judge in Texas could strike down the FDA's decades-old approval of mifepristone. This ruling would outlaw this safe and effective abortion pill nationwide – even in states like New Jersey that protect a woman's right to make her own healthcare choices.

A woman and her doctor should make those health decisions. Politicians and judges don't belong in those conversations. That's what I believe and one of the things our movement is about.

Will you chip in now and join the fight before our end-of-month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

Here's the truth: most Americans support access to safe and legal abortion. In the last year, many states have expanded protections for abortions, abortion funds have popped up everywhere, and when abortion has been on the ballot, even in traditionally red states like Kansas, voters have chosen to protect it.

This isn't a time to sit on the sidelines. We have to energize a grassroots movement like never before to restore reproductive rights. Chip in now to join the movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

I will always stand on the side of the freedom to choose. And I promise to do everything in my power to expand access across every state.

Andy

$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2023-02-26-abortionpill-eom&refcode2=052f6542-deb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&amounts=10,30,50,100,200]

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sherrod Brown isn't only the best Ohio has to offer, he's one of the most dedicated, empathetic and effective Senators in the country. We need Sen. Brown in Washington, to be there to regulate corporate power in the aftermath of East Palestine. Help us send him back to the Senate?
body:
After East Palestine, we need him more than ever
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e62a1a7-5ed0-4f2f-8c94-e5444f5b1454/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| | | | | Peter, **The disaster suffered in East Palestine, Ohio, caused by the toxic train derailment is a parable about modern America. **Look no further than this: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0d6722d-4ee8-444a-a0a5-fd7d896fa0d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Republican Donald Trump gutted the regulation that could've prevented the tragedy from happening_** , **_because Republicans worry more about large corporations making an extra billion than the basic needs of regular people._** **_GOP Governor of Ohio, Mike DeWine, refuses to call a state emergency to receive extra federal resources_** _ because, well...I have no idea. He's a multi-millionaire. He's been in government nearly every year since the 1980s. Maybe he's just given up caring._ **_Meanwhile, Senator Sherrod Brown, who we remind you has a difficult reelection ahead in 2024, Is A Leader_ :** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dc131a2-ee85-42f8-b77c-7bd0fbe6ca66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Senator Brown isn't just on the scene when there's a disaster. He's argued against corporate power and monopolies, and fought for raising wages, improving worker benefits and strengthening unions for years._** [**_Can you join us in this moment, as we're reminded of Senator Brown's importance, in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to reelect him?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te176d533-4039-4be1-a2ee-e7d4e6bcf4a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T084f934d-e625-4b9f-8f67-67cd79a8db36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
My girlfriend loves this wallet...

**FREE SHIPPING ON ALL ORDERS SITEWIDE** ♦️ [FIREARMS & HUNTING](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/911824e5c387d0d4bc224b60fbbb88dde145385e/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) ♦️ [OPTICS](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/6ed0f6da505624f5e9cf32d39521a723250d4dfc/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) ♦️ [HOLSTERS](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/ef08b2c9b232516bb1c4e553c410a214fb941d0a/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) ♦️ [CLEARANCE](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/5d61fd339ca55241d80f4aff91e01b49823d63bc/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) ♦️
---
| | |
---
My girlfriend loves this wallet. When she goes out with her friends, she gets her heels on, the music flowing, and the Uber’s going. She also takes something I never understood: A little purse. “What can you even fit in that tiny little thing?” I asked her. “A credit card, a twenty dollar bill, and my house key,” she replied. “That’s ridiculous,” I thought to myself. “She needs more protection than that.” So I went online to see if there was something I can give her to carry more things when she goes out. She is very picky when it comes to her accessories when going out, [So it took me a while, but I found it.](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/05b143ba4ea84181edb69dcf62b7b88b142959ef/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) Finally, I found what I was looking for...
---
[](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/cbc0625427db5905e7a7002b0a5fe62eaa9709ca/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3)
---
This sleek, elegant, and [slick wallet holds up to 10 credit cards and cash!](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/05b143ba4ea84181edb69dcf62b7b88b142959ef/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3) I gifted this beauty to my girl and she loved it! She couldn’t stop talking about it with her friends. It’s lightweight, weatherproof, rust proof, and is basically indestructible. Best of all– she loves it, and it’s RFID protected so no scumbag can snag her information. I feel good knowing she has a lot of financial protection, and more room in her little bag in case she needs to carry anything else.

[This wallet doesn’t compare to the other ones.](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11706/6374453/05b143ba4ea84181edb69dcf62b7b88b142959ef/12276bd4ef1cc3cf62c83107b9d349c40e6cd6a3)

Better hurry, they’re obviously going fast!

body:
They’re attacking Marcy already. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59286183/393754199/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230226FR_N_TK_90DA_3_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM2YzJlOC1lMWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq489PKXtSiuQUoA15BdimQ8O_-D70n6Jn_o_YMCXOg=)

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is already attacking Marcy because they are going to do whatever it takes to try and flip this seat and keep their majority in the House.

All roads to retaking the House start by winning this seat in 2024. The GOP knows this, and that’s why they’re already launching attacks. No matter who we’re up against in 2024, we know that they’ll be well-funded by the GOP and NRCC machine that hopes to flip this seat.

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8288df951ff14d7bb2695d7bee2874f5&_e=xvtKNDw9NKJwAyTipOM4E-oK5eF7_NiPvABJQfCl4xzBE08ogpDTE2sA0x1Hk4tL6ajNvTbF-fjOmojSXd4rYzMmq-QgzJ0HRVomUHO6fXvj_nWqXH6LYP-unTcQdGH8RuYFaAV8v7sfS6GaiZG_L3k4HUzMjWfLeIDDMtfgyDizvIwrVXo5GZaBV78MvY8ZWY1WS09PyO1vVOtG-QvgFo2lWt4882Mrt3CfQbIOY-q4v30vdg6c4t7YvCpk8II6cx_MFdto6fDxdQyja5_IbCx7GAlv0WhEuqlzyPln6q4gOjHhpoYd4WZ1Z8omQKaPaNg-6YrbN3kj6HYsrs2OC1_x71__xq8pyO4RSwLh8FCHY1xMf6NAtIJdYWLcLW7ubo7LLN607-y5pdgMnw-UVw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8288df951ff14d7bb2695d7bee2874f5&_e=xvtKNDw9NKJwAyTipOM4E-oK5eF7_NiPvABJQfCl4xzBE08ogpDTE2sA0x1Hk4tL6ajNvTbF-fjOmojSXd4rYzMmq-QgzJ0HRVomUHO6fXvj_nWqXH6LYP-unTcQdGH8RuYFaAV8v7sfS6GaiZG_L3k4HUzMjWfLeIDDMtfgyDizvIwrVXo5GZaBV78MvY8ZWY1WS09PyO1vVOtG-QvgFo2lWt4882Mrt3CfQbIOY-q4v30vdg6c4t7YvCpk8II6-fx7jKAvkglTaPQ0gOVkNt3FcwpwOIr3-dAiS7cOGXutp3KhPc_2HWiAA6um3VHU9yvBND6ykwntIYJ1X_icsiYykMNGJhy2hov-F9Jx0bKil_r3uR9IWbmOsGCBruzwoVoevnbjajAROK3hQaCqWw%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8288df951ff14d7bb2695d7bee2874f5&_e=xvtKNDw9NKJwAyTipOM4E-oK5eF7_NiPvABJQfCl4xzBE08ogpDTE2sA0x1Hk4tL6ajNvTbF-fjOmojSXd4rYzMmq-QgzJ0HRVomUHO6fXvj_nWqXH6LYP-unTcQdGH8RuYFaAV8v7sfS6GaiZG_L3k4HUzMjWfLeIDDMtfgyDizvIwrVXo5GZaBV78MvY8ZWY1WS09PyO1vVOtG-QvgFo2lWt4882Mrt3CfQbIOY-q4v30vdg6c4t7YvCpk8II6B8e6QdsJdaFuG6teDR2Yj5LFNB9sAGLrfO1E0lPwpPsOih5BNeRW50GYdHCgzl104sqXx0WlghubXXw8mmYJgDPPz-AOg032ubN9aErGM0aUxoTqExfarwxluno1RGPwqUOx3oEPIfgKXl-eJFw2xQ%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8288df951ff14d7bb2695d7bee2874f5&_e=xvtKNDw9NKJwAyTipOM4E-oK5eF7_NiPvABJQfCl4xzBE08ogpDTE2sA0x1Hk4tL6ajNvTbF-fjOmojSXd4rYzMmq-QgzJ0HRVomUHO6fXvj_nWqXH6LYP-unTcQdGH8RuYFaAV8v7sfS6GaiZG_L3k4HUzMjWfLeIDDMtfgyDizvIwrVXo5GZaBV78MvY8ZWY1WS09PyO1vVOtG-QvgFo2lWt4882Mrt3CfQbIOY-q4v30vdg6c4t7YvCpk8II6eTBT6D3N-GIXW3WdKKfK8r6qliEaSyuBkevq9SXUVvkc69wzJCMEVcTs9XV4TxM662zpFrcWGxtwc9OLCcIm5YRhKy_QEKnLYwc6CLxwGALByZSyS8RPNTVd0tCoiNxDpxOeo1xOyQq-9gl6Q9YYwQ%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Sen. Ron Johnson
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366243:61fgVcGNz:m:1:3331421248:EBB708EFA637EC497949E2C574C1A893:r)

Peter, it's Senator Ron Johnson. I need you to do me a small favor.

You've done a lot to fight for Republicans over the years. In fact, our records indicate that you're one of the most active grassroots conservatives in your community.
**That 's why I've selected YOU to represent YOUR AREA in the 2023 NRSC Nationwide Census.**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366243:61fgVcGNz:m:1:3331421248:EBB708EFA637EC497949E2C574C1A893:r)

[TAKE THE CENSUS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366243:61fgVcGNz:m:1:3331421248:EBB708EFA637EC497949E2C574C1A893:r)

It's extremely important for you to complete your brief survey as soon as possible.

_Your responses will represent your entire area, and it will provide my colleagues and I with the critical information we need to build a winning strategy for 2024._

Out of the thousands of conservatives in your area, I chose you because of your relentless support in our fight against the radical Left.

I trust I made the right decision, and I hope you won't let me down.

**[So please, take the 2023 NRSC Nationwide Census RIGHT NOW to give us vital input as we craft our strategy to win back the Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366243:61fgVcGNz:m:1:3331421248:EBB708EFA637EC497949E2C574C1A893:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366243:61fgVcGNz:m:1:3331421248:EBB708EFA637EC497949E2C574C1A893:r)
Senator Ron Johnson
Wisconsin

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.
They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.
It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
[**I can’t do it without your support, team. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59286486/393755269/1625636876?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_NO_20230224_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDUwMGZiZi1lMmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=116Y6GPfP0vpoKB3faR9MPeCRZhTXYoHzdiunsqsBcE=)

clean_body: I was one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. | = Folks, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Tester & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Tester & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thinking about running for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/193?t=1&akid=28%2E135344%2Er5dqW7)
Friend -
Since Senator Stabenow announced her retirement, I’ve gotten a lot of questions about whether or not I am going to run for the U.S. Senate in Michigan this year, and I want to be honest about it with you.
The short answer is: Yes, I am thinking about running.
I believe the United States Senate is in need of practical, reasonable, independently-minded people who are willing to work with others to get things done. That was brought home to me again last week when we had a shooting at MSU, the second in my district in 15 months.
There are too many people in Congress right now who refuse to even come to the table and have a reasonable discussion about how we can do things like protect our children from gun violence or lower the cost of prescription drugs.
So, I am doing my due diligence, talking about running with close friends and people I trust. But running statewide is most definitely a team effort.
**So today, I am asking if you will follow me on social media so you can stay up to date with the latest from our campaign and be the first to know about new developments.**
**[TWITTER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/200?t=2&akid=28%2E135344%2Er5dqW7)**
**[FACEBOOK](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/206?t=3&akid=28%2E135344%2Er5dqW7)**
**[INSTAGRAM](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/207?t=4&akid=28%2E135344%2Er5dqW7)**
Thank you,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=28%2E135344%2Er5dqW7).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

The short answer is: Yes, I am thinking about running. I believe the United States Senate is in need of practical, reasonable, independently-minded people who are willing to work with others to get things done. There are too many people in Congress right now who refuse to even come to the table and have a reasonable discussion about how we can do things like protect our children from gun violence or lower the cost of prescription drugs. name: Giffords PAC
subject: We’ll get right to it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t afford to slow down
#

Friends -
We’ll get right to it: in just two days we’re facing our February end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we are pacing behind our goals.
February is a challenging month for fundraising. It’s the shortest month of the year, meaning we have less time to reach our goals. Many folks gave over the holidays, and we understand it’s a lot to continue asking for your financial support.
We wish we didn’t have to ask. But the truth is, we really can’t afford to slow down.
Not when the Florida legislature is pushing reckless “guns everywhere” permitless carry laws that will allow people without any training or licensing to carry guns in public, no questions asked.
Not when we’ve already experienced over 80 mass shootings since the beginning of 2023.
Not when we have two incredibly important pieces of legislation in the U.S. House and Senate that could help us pass universal background checks at the national level once and for all.
[**So please, use this link to contribute $3 before our February fundraising drive comes to an end on Tuesday night. We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=1&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-feb23.bz_51b&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=20&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-feb23.DP5oYT&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=21&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-feb23.A7XpEF&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=22&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-feb23.cbL74m&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=23&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-feb23.0e7VmA&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=24&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb23.UurDMh&refcode=em230226-1-subs&t=25&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu)**
---
****
Make no mistake: Gun safety is a top priority among Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. But we’re up against elected officials who have chosen to side with the gun lobby instead of their constituents.
Thank you for being on our team as we work towards a future free from gun violence.
\- The team at Giffords

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4311%2E3935704%2EIKUQWu) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: We can’t afford to slow down Friends - We’ll get right to it: in just two days we’re facing our February end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we are pacing behind our goals. February is a challenging month for fundraising. It’s the shortest month of the year, meaning we have less time to reach our goals. Many folks gave over the holidays, and we understand it’s a lot to continue asking for your financial support. We wish we didn’t have to ask. But the truth is, we really can’t afford to slow down. Not when the Florida legislature is pushing reckless “guns everywhere” permitless carry laws that will allow people without any training or licensing to carry guns in public, no questions asked. Not when we’ve already experienced over 80 mass shootings since the beginning of 2023. Not when we have two incredibly important pieces of legislation in the U.S. House and Senate that could help us pass universal background checks at the national level once and for all. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Make no mistake: Gun safety is a top priority among Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. But we’re up against elected officials who have chosen to side with the gun lobby instead of their constituents. Thank you for being on our team as we work towards a future free from gun violence. \- The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: CRITICAL: National Security Threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | I don't mean to scare you, but this is our current reality.

The Chinese Communist Party is rapidly buying up American farmland located near U.S. military bases.

Let me be clear: this is a threat to our national security.

We need 1,000 rapid-response patriots to sign our petition in the next 30 minutes. Can we count on your support?

Sign now to **BAN** the Chinese government from purchasing U.S. farmland.
---
| | [SIGN NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365713:6b9DIcGUN:m:1:3365131770:073C41E78F60B11C4E73EB941606182E:r)
---
If we continue to allow the Chinese government to get away with this, then they will gain control of our food systems and soon after that, our other natural resources.

What you do now will impact our national security for many years to come. **Please join us.**

---
| | [SIGN NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365713:6b9DIcGUN:m:1:3365131770:073C41E78F60B11C4E73EB941606182E:r)
---

-Mike Pompeo

---
| |
* * *

name: Deadline Alert (via DLCC)
subject: Your 3x match offer →
body:
To help us catch up to our goal before midnight on Tuesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | |
---
| | Hi – We hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our February fundraising goal – and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t get back on track ASAP. Right now, we're matching all gifts before our end-of-month deadline 3x – so to help us catch up before midnight on Tuesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. **Can you take a look at what we have on record for you?** | **Name** | **Email** | **Status** | **Suggested Gift**
---|---|---|---
Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A
**On File** | **[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zPxM5q-4kK8uu6lZcSOahK4InhYdFXlzaxnqq0uP-l1CZB802_6n9BXI4kaH3kw3AiPT4pW3DYfCbSTse-5Sn6HPok64ad4_c0CClMgT7endMIArOnz9JkXr0cQTtZdYRVjolhynQexhc4qS4m_eItw1qZHE2JQsejr4TTi3eYgqum540IN52ridSleU_Py7-qUfnVrqscmFoLmDizMYk1zi3HSXAIVJ3ravBhonkpKXYJoasEZy36DAlL1GVKGqK4iG0aTBRSiTYAQLwaixDzdyX2rgwRQVVhud24VkXw0OXhSAmsGsqCuDo92mBAJycaQm0MNNjFYvPpTXjhhj2qs6Y9CTTozChf6sMQ_tn4rrh_dFc7Nnse5Va9d-KDd2aOR7PZw0nWI-nUMCgGslTll9yR6TzgNGo0SP1mfJ-2-5jv5e2KiOSUtJg1U8HXbyjjvGdaRoHNWttWwOZ5o2gEkB8MJLKM5VtuCP8gsZDsxGHqU8YwaKjsqYTqtaGtBuYKXrU27khvvqCrBgVTOlW5/3u1/rui6KMKjSsKjRN3SX6REvA/h0/JkLLG5ZN2FPfPA6Emau1OsGN7TyXoLhTcC6-mkVfIMA)** | **PENDING** | **$7**
Deborah T. | – | Contributed | N/A
Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A
If everyone who received this email chipped in $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that isn’t how this works – not even close.
**However, if every Democrat in your state reading this rushed a donation before our deadline on Tuesday, it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track.**
[Can you chip in an urgent $7 ($21 impact!) gift right now to help our team close the gap? clean_body: To help us catch up to our goal before midnight on Tuesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. | | | | | Hi – We hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our February fundraising goal – and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t get back on track ASAP. Right now, we're matching all gifts before our end-of-month deadline 3x – so to help us catch up before midnight on Tuesday, we pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. Can you take a look at what we have on record for you? | Name | Email | Status | Suggested Gift ---|---|---|--- Janet M. | – | Contributed | N/A On File | | PENDING | $7 Deborah T. | – | Contributed | N/A Mark C. | – | Contributed | N/A If everyone who received this email chipped in $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that isn’t how this works – not even close. However, if every Democrat in your state reading this rushed a donation before our deadline on Tuesday, it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track. We can’t afford to fall behind on our fundraising right now – here’s why: February is a short month which means we had fewer days to hit our massive fundraising goal. Republicans are dumping their MAGA millions into special elections and attack ads to make up for their midterm losses. And we need to keep the powerful grassroots momentum we’ve built to elect state Democrats now, in 2024, and beyond. Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.
They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.
It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
[**I can’t do it without your support, team. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59292439/393778495/-901866986?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230226_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI2YTQ5Yi1lZWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mRu1hi65dg9Ot_SDeDUyrFMtyz1YmuqgIo-6X37ovg=)

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.
**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**
It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.
Thanks,
Jon
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jason Crow and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jason Crow and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. Thanks, Jon Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

Friend,
Mark sent you an email the other day, but I wanted to follow up personally. Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just a couple of days, and we’re still not where we need to be.
I’m fighting with everything I have to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. We’re holding opioid manufacturers accountable for the death and destruction they caused in our communities, putting money back into the pockets of victims of wage theft, protecting the reproductive freedom of Minnesotans, and so much more.
We’re making huge steps forward, but I can’t overstate how important it is to make sure we can keep up the fight – and we can’t do it without the ongoing support of this grassroots movement.
In order to continue our work together, I need your help. To reach our monthly goal for February, we only need to raise $4,000 by 11:59 pm on Tuesday.
**But here’s the good news, team, Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1st. That means you can make a $50 donation to my campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.**
It’s easy to claim your refund. After you donate, my team will send you a receipt and a 2023 PCR application in the mail. After completing the PCR application, simply mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue and they’ll mail back your refund.
[**Will you take advantage of your PCR to help us reach our February budget target? Peter,

Republicans are already setting the stage for a 2024 red wave by restricting voting access across the country.

Proposed legislation to restrict voting access includes:
* Launching an election police force that could file charges for suspected “voting offenses”
* Prohibiting schools from serving as polling locations
* Required photo ID to enter a polling location

And the list goes on...

Valerie ran for Congress to stand up to extremist Republicans and advocate for wider access to the ballot.

We need a Democratic House to help stop these Republican voter suppression efforts. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there, it's Alex.
I’m reaching out today to ask you to [**join me in supporting Senator Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23-tb.60mrYg&refcode=em230226-1-180&t=1&akid=1198%2E159979%2EzWoHur)** I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why our support — especially right now — is so important to her campaign’s success.
Tammy’s been on the front lines of the fight to guarantee health care for ALL Americans, and she championed the Respect for Marriage Act to protect LGBTQ and interracial marriages nationwide. **We can’t afford to lose her voice in the U.S. Senate.**
But political forecasters are already predicting that Wisconsin will be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country in 2024. President Biden won Wisconsin by just 0.6% in 2020, and last year Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.
So Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into Wisconsin to take her seat — and the Democratic Senate majority — and she’s counting on us to have her back against anything they throw her way.
**Are you in?**
[**Please split a contribution between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin. A contribution now will make a HUGE difference as Tammy and her team get ready for the tough fight ahead.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23-tb.60mrYg&refcode=em230226-1-180&t=2&akid=1198%2E159979%2EzWoHur)
**[SPLIT A DONATION**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23-tb.60mrYg&refcode=em230226-1-180&t=3&akid=1198%2E159979%2EzWoHur)
The truth is that it is not going to be easy to take on Mitch McConnell and his army of right-wing megadonors. But if we all stand together with Tammy, she can take them on and win.
Thank you in advance for making a contribution if you’re able. It means a lot to both of us.
Alex Padilla
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23-tb.60mrYg&refcode=em230226-1-180&t=4&akid=1198%2E159979%2EzWoHur)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1198%2E159979%2EzWoHur)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We just got bad news from The Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
I'll get right to it, Derek: The Washington Post just named my seat in Nevada one of the **most endangered seats** heading into 2024.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-1-8259&refcode2=8259_434096_UpXboc&akid=8259%2E434096%2EUpXboc)
**I'm vulnerable, and I'm counting on your early grassroots support to help me fight back against the GOP. That's why I'm asking you directly:[So please, will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and John Fetterman’s to keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-1-8259&refcode2=8259_434096_UpXboc&akid=8259%2E434096%2EUpXboc)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-8259&refcode2=8259_434096_UpXboc&akid=8259%2E434096%2EUpXboc)**
There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. **That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now -- today.**
Because it's not just your $5. It's your $5 combined with $5 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue.
**Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada -- so please, Derek, we need all hands on deck: [Will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and John Fetterman’s -- every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle -- to fuel us to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-1-8259&refcode2=8259_434096_UpXboc&akid=8259%2E434096%2EUpXboc)**
I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.
-- Jacky

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230226-8259-footer&t=1&refcode2=8259_434096_UpXboc&akid=8259%2E434096%2EUpXboc)**

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Five reasons to chip in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Everything we accomplish starts and ends with support from people like you.
#
Derek -
Here are FIVE reasons why you should chip in to VoteVets before our deadline at the end of the month:
1. Kevin McCarthy and Republican radicals are working on a list of cuts to vital social programs before they raise the debt ceiling.

2. If they don't get the cuts they want, they could walk the economy off a cliff — leading us to a default on our debt.

3. Secretary Janet Yellen just raised the alarm, warning about “economic and financial catastrophe” if we default, with support for Veterans and their families at risk.

4. VoteVets is hard at work — in Washington and around the country — pushing members of Congress to raise the debt ceiling, support our Veterans, and give millions of Americans some peace of mind.

5. Chipping in $5 right away is one of the best things you can do to support that work.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: $2 million to expand extracurricular opportunities for our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi there,

I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown communities and the Heartland. That’s why I’m proud to have brought home new funding to invest nearly $2 million in extracurricular educational opportunities for young people in mid-Michigan.

**Helping our children learn and succeed is crucial, and one of the reasons I will work with anyone — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents — to deliver for working families.**

Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.**

**[February is a shorter month, so we have fewer days to hit our monthly fundraising goal. clean_body: | Hi there, I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown communities and the Heartland. That’s why I’m proud to have brought home new funding to invest nearly $2 million in extracurricular educational opportunities for young people in mid-Michigan. Helping our children learn and succeed is crucial, and one of the reasons I will work with anyone — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents — to deliver for working families. Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference. On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. name: Corey DeAngelis
subject: School choice is under attack in Arizona [WATCH VIDEO NOW]

body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62367010:6iaPwcGrN:m:1:3391001263:D5DBC7FC8205277D38D5792FC8FA3076:r)
---
| | Hi Patriot, Corey DeAngelis here, Senior Fellow at the American Federation for Children. I don't know what I'm more surprised by, the fact that Katie Hobbs is blatantly lying about school choice bankrupting her state **or** that she wants to rip away education freedom from vulnerable families in Arizona. She has attempted to paint school choice as an unfair system and a detriment to public schools **which is simply not true**. The reality is that school choice provides opportunity and hope for families who otherwise would not have access to quality education for their children. As a beneficiary of a private school education herself, you would think she wouldn't fight to prevent other students from having that same opportunity.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62367011:6iaPwcGrN:m:1:3391001263:D5DBC7FC8205277D38D5792FC8FA3076:r)

name: Becca Balint
subject: The daughter of an immigrant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
You’re the reason why a candidate like me can get elected to Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59293907/393783345/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTA5OWMxOC1mMmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YStl9WMg8n-jkpL4sjHJJjo4F-_PBy4vV3gjEyj7_JA=&emci=352ceeaa-6fb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45099c18-f2b5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Dear Peter, To be completely honest with you, I hate asking for money. It’s easily one of my least favorite parts of the job. And you might be thinking, you were just sworn in — what’s the point? **It’s a fair question! But the thing is, when you run for Congress, you have to run every two years. And remember all of the work it took to get here?** We faced an extremely competitive and contested primary. At many points, we were out-raised, out-spent, and down in the polls. Next cycle, it’s likely that we could face another competitive primary, and conservative interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. We cannot take a single thing for granted – and we cannot let our campaign operation lapse. Grassroots contributions from people like you are the reason why a candidate like me – a lesbian mom and the daughter of an immigrant – can get elected to Congress. Every month, we sit down to crunch the numbers and figure out what exactly we need to raise online to stay in good shape financially. clean_body: You’re the reason why a candidate like me can get elected to Congress. | | Dear Peter, To be completely honest with you, I hate asking for money. It’s easily one of my least favorite parts of the job. And you might be thinking, you were just sworn in — what’s the point? It’s a fair question! But the thing is, when you run for Congress, you have to run every two years. And remember all of the work it took to get here? We faced an extremely competitive and contested primary. At many points, we were out-raised, out-spent, and down in the polls. Next cycle, it’s likely that we could face another competitive primary, and conservative interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. We cannot take a single thing for granted – and we cannot let our campaign operation lapse. Grassroots contributions from people like you are the reason why a candidate like me – a lesbian mom and the daughter of an immigrant – can get elected to Congress. Every month, we sit down to crunch the numbers and figure out what exactly we need to raise online to stay in good shape financially. If we raise $10,000 this month, we’ll be on track for the quarter — and thanks to supporters like you, we only have $1,556.50 to go! Peter, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, but we need all hands on deck to keep our campaign operation running smoothly.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for everything, Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . subject: Sign now: No massive police training complex. Stop Cop City!

body:
Police want to destroy an Atlanta forest to create a fake city for police to practice militarized tactics against civilians. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvjBnmI74S8IEmtRxkA8vVrxso_DssvAES7Nx-UFcRMmq7AMSy6gdI4mLVpHBmITRvMXs_QeqXZRtAynVdVn2VuP6MwdXCWkit47tNd_kzeYvU0k8t5XGAMP48OGPMJJ0Bm1puOz_BVdj2T_bJXQuDlR13zMqaCU9tD5-z20_gzLY/3u1/YLoQDXvtSMGXK-2OfyJFww/h0/u4Z6VwQDU4nAxMUn8EU7Za0G8gjI5yj9Z11zgjnpIIA)

Friend, Police are working towards destroying a forest in Atlanta, Georgia to create a fake city for practicing militarized tactics against civilians. This would also devastate the watershed upon which a nearby Black community depends. Right now, the Weelaunee Forest offsets stormwater runoff, helps to keep the city cool, and improves air quality. Studies show that green spaces can support community well-being and safety, including reducing crime. **Instead of investing in ways to make our communities safer, the Atlanta Police Foundation wants to spend $90 million on destroying the forest to create Cop City -- so more militarized police can learn how to enact more violence on primarily Black and brown communities.** This makes us all less safe. But, since Cop City does not yet have the full funding necessary to scale the project, they’re turning to private investors. **There’s still time to put pressure on these investors to halt all funding to the Atlanta Police Foundation and APF Support Inc.** [**Sign the petition to private investors: No massive police training complex. Protect the Weelaunee Forest and stop Cop City!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoqtzBVuDWzysF3-SloohX_mQmbK2LNEMFqV9NkalIuGuzyFVQzys2cyMQ0-p9HIADeKGk1y40ca3LPaaqDiRHc_lbgfJeH05rPdrg6g5P6CFrnD9dHjmy9jJsu0yRzC6gEoG2zVEyAtPMNxOrckUSgvYm8LjJVEYRY80YSc_cdWKXaXWuyLPbCY3O76SZ1JYQt4HkXiFMtVteNdB_JLMSavqRK-8z41cHa-Zg2W_EY3auBtv9UySbDhHJ6uplkaJaOWG4jN0NPyrTq2WQkYQW_9-kcfa9uAao6--t88LJBYnz4N5zmIF-MZlFHFjldY6PvuOwT28vqCiDG99Aj1WE6_xoYRVFFT-SUl22J_J_f3KsW7OAACdAsR7gt2PRCAb7Td-GEij4r553zxY1yEbziYx8nZ3Iq9XCuKOH-lIfatHXzSEeylvI7yN6AjrnVTSDlBzdfD8v1aYfvUD9VyJUh8SauCAmyndHtvXZBWuiAPmsy3Gr4R3WWpX01BhjtLU3/3u1/YLoQDXvtSMGXK-2OfyJFww/h1/r0Oh1jId7ei3N95GGMiM7alDK4qjVXdQiP0s-RRDh2w) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoqtzBVuDWzysF3-SloohX_mQmbK2LNEMFqV9NkalIuGuzyFVQzys2cyMQ0-p9HIADeKGk1y40ca3LPaaqDiRHc_lbgfJeH05rPdrg6g5P6CFrnD9dHjmy9jJsu0yRzC6gEoG2zVEyAtPMNxOrckUSgvYm8LjJVEYRY80YSc_cdWKXaXWuyLPbCY3O76SZ1JYQt4HkXiFMtVteNdB_JLMSavqRK-8z41cHa-Zg2W_EY3auBtv9UySbDhHJ6uplkaJaPdH1gGAmFMZYscaGDpToIPtVr2gdL3XD5e79ulOxJa1HsJKwx9826zSGuEJMn9WP_ctmqCBa49V5jf9vHw2FzcGHuIbKuNyLhNilEWGWhpVMbcaGM0hlbmE_3SC75YuiPe6Vwfe3BioZ_ZUlB2Tkh1RaG9sXBMjpZEZB0EvoqosY5YgGkPkdmf_Kbl1BqK4Sqic4RATmDkGzP08v5LBjO5BEDdHW88ba1kzACQT-4cTaRWANSJMNq638UQnHTnnZ/3u1/YLoQDXvtSMGXK-2OfyJFww/h2/ujKEwhsnmoH8Dl_7SZUXRtI7q1umTQXkWj8NkpAe27c)

Last month, police murdered one of the forest defenders, Tortuguita, who was living in the forest with other activists to block the project.
Now, the police are trying to charge at least 19 protesters with domestic terrorism, for activities including “sleeping in the forest” and being “known members” of “a prison abolitionist movement.”
We can support the righteous forest defenders by pressuring private investors to halt all funding for the project. Let’s honor Tortuguita, with action.

clean_body: Police want to destroy an Atlanta forest to create a fake city for police to practice militarized tactics against civilians. | | | Friend, Police are working towards destroying a forest in Atlanta, Georgia to create a fake city for practicing militarized tactics against civilians. This would also devastate the watershed upon which a nearby Black community depends. Right now, the Weelaunee Forest offsets stormwater runoff, helps to keep the city cool, and improves air quality. Studies show that green spaces can support community well-being and safety, including reducing crime. Instead of investing in ways to make our communities safer, the Atlanta Police Foundation wants to spend $90 million on destroying the forest to create Cop City -- so more militarized police can learn how to enact more violence on primarily Black and brown communities. This makes us all less safe. But, since Cop City does not yet have the full funding necessary to scale the project, they’re turning to private investors. There’s still time to put pressure on these investors to halt all funding to the Atlanta Police Foundation and APF Support Inc. | Last month, police murdered one of the forest defenders, Tortuguita, who was living in the forest with other activists to block the project. Now, the police are trying to charge at least 19 protesters with domestic terrorism, for activities including “sleeping in the forest” and being “known members” of “a prison abolitionist movement.” We can support the righteous forest defenders by pressuring private investors to halt all funding for the project. Let’s honor Tortuguita, with action. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

Peter, I'm reaching out to respectfully ask if you can make a $5 contribution to my campaign before midnight. Allow me to briefly explain why: The end of February means there’s just one month until we will have to submit our first fundraising report to the FEC since I was elected to Congress. Lots of people -- from the GOP and special interests to potential opponents -- will look closely through our report to see if we have what it takes to win in IL-17 once again. **We’re aiming to raise $30,000 in online donations by the end of February to stay on pace. And here’s the key: If we meet our monthly goals, our FEC numbers will send a clear message about the strength behind our movement. That will put us in a good early position to defend this seat.** **[Please use this link to contribute to our re-election campaign before midnight tonight. name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Emergency action to stop illegal immigration
body:
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366611:6D7svcGQN:m:1:3331421248:1A47EC12F0296CBB498D64B495B8F929:r)
---
**BREAKING NEWS: "America First Legal & Texas File For An Emergency Injunction To Block Biden's Most Extreme Open Borders Decree..."**
Peter, Did you see the headline above recently? **The situation is dire.** The far-left is cheering as DHS attempts to roll out Biden's most insidious and radical open borders edict to date:**a parole program for illegal aliens**. **This lawless action is a threat to American sovereignty. ** That's why _America First Legal is taking action_ to stop it. We're proud to work with the courageous Ken Paxton to represent Texas and a coalition of twenty states as we seek an **emergency preliminary injunction** to shut down this pernicious program, and prevent it from injecting a new wave of illegal aliens into America. [**Support America First Legal Here >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366611:6D7svcGQN:m:1:3331421248:1A47EC12F0296CBB498D64B495B8F929:r) The unlawful program allows illegal aliens to obtain advance approval to enter the United States - despite no basis in the law for them doing so. And the preliminary injunction we just filed for _**will stop this program cold while we fight it in court!**_ Biden's staggeringly RADICAL plan to **mass import illegal aliens** directly to the United States without any legal basis for doing so is nothing more than a brazen attempt to accelerate stratospheric migration levels while concealing its sheer volume by transporting illegal aliens directly into the American interior. If we don't stop Biden's program the damage will be catastrophic: **a deluge of illegal migrants flooding our labor markets, burdening taxpayers, jeopardizing public health and safety, and stretching our safety net to the breaking point. ** [_To win our fight to_** _stop this traitorous campaign_** _to transform our country with mass illegal immigration we need your help. Please support our efforts right now with a generous donation,_**_thank you! >> _**_ _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366611:6D7svcGQN:m:1:3331421248:1A47EC12F0296CBB498D64B495B8F929:r) _Thank you for your crucial support as we fight this lawless scheme!_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

name: Our Revolution
subject: we're bringing back the HELP sticker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

As the new Chairman of the HELP committee, Bernie Sanders has been busy
defending workers and striking fear into the hearts of Big Pharma and
billionaire CEOs like Howard Schultz and Jeff Bezos.

To honor his incredible work, Our Revolution rolled out a special sticker
last month, and it's proven to be a big hit! That's why we're bringing it

# Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Court Decision in Judicial Nominations Case
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c255yqriOkN6AJ9akLB9AQkfim0vp0sAid6nB3mdEwyiPS8Cx4YsxdL-IDKOixXE3xgsCEsOymwYApuC7UV53Rm1l-wdigV1gtUTt0wzFnYjnUMGR1aZ_JorYOrNk9je4WMWrcs0k6Ik-YSSgmHqKCKZAQmi8jRnevYmUD2njp_Uve6uk8JBaR7lKdAyVxRkk_spqzyZKJy8xT5x2HN1e9LYv_Ny2k4XYqFiJZLC6DoW3MCEOi5jWgL2WUIcmKXaK3RnPCo_nA6QGGMiW8Z3gA==&c=4bKCryZPZKjXwTGKhij6Sg04Q2WGgzAtXBJ7WbqgsK4-IWabrzkwxw==&ch=MUR5sFk-u6IPk_hT2LaM5q3ANl44N2wUN9CMQRbKX7TtXWQJUxEMvQ==)
---
The decision from Judge Whelan confirms that Senate Democrats once again disregarded the State Constitution to support their partisan objectives. Instead of following the law, Senate Democrats stacked the Judiciary Committee with far-left legislators to defeat a historic Court of Appeals nominee.
I want to thank Senator Palumbo and the Senate Republican Conference for defending the State Constitution. This decision will have a significant role in protecting the independence of New York's judicial system from far-left politicians.
---

| Ortt, Norris introduce legislation allowing mileage reimbursement for volunteer firefighters, EMTs
New York State Senate Republican Leader Robert Ortt and Assemblyman Mike Norris (R,C-Lockport) are announcing new legislation they have introduced that would assist volunteer firefighters and ambulance workers for costs relating to using their personal vehicles when they are responding to emergencies, reimbursing them at the mileage rate for gas and vehicle wear and tear through a state tax credit (A.4094).

# New York Post \- Albany's criminal arrogance: Dissing David Soares to ignore the truth

"Thank you for having me here to testify about public safety in New York state," Albany DA David Soares intended to kick off his statement to the state Senate this month -- but he never got to, as an aide called at 10 p.m. the night before to disinvite him.

It's beyond obvious that the lefties who call the shots didn't want a black progressive detailing to their faces how recent criminal-justice reforms "have been extremely detrimental to public safety," with "their most devastating impact on black and brown communities."

After all, after the (white) head of the state DAs Association read the same text, progressives simply denounced it as "offensive," "pejorative" and "condescending" (Sen. Jamaal Bailey, D-Bx) and "political," "nonfactual" and not "appropriate" (Sen. Zellnor Myrie, D-B'klyn).

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: What do campaign donations fund in the “off-year”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We rely 100% on grassroots donations.
#
We'll get right to the point, Peter:
Since winning the election last year, our online fundraising has slowed dramatically. A small slowdown is natural after a busy period like an election, but we're starting to get antsy that our numbers won't pick up in time to cover our operational costs.
Here's a screenshot directly from our ActBlue:
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230226.MOG_SQ&refcode=em20230226-2242&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)
**What does a campaign do in the off-year?** Great question. Much of what we do during the “off-year” lays the groundwork for success during an election year, for Cori that means:
* **Amplifying her legislative work in Congress.**
* **Combating attacks from far right extremists** and media outlets like Fox News
* **Educating the public about her policies in ways that are accessible** , like how a Green New Deal for Cities could impact their town, or how the fall of Roe v. Wade impacts their access to health care.
* **Ensuring Cori has a strong presence in her community** , and much more.

**These efforts create a strong foundation for victory during the Election Year — and we cannot miss opportunities by falling short on our end-of-month goals.** That's why we're hoping we can count on this grassroots movement to step up and help us make up the difference over the next few days.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help us close the February fundraising gap?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230226.MOG_SQ&refcode=em20230226-2242&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230226.MOG_SQ&refcode=em20230226-2242&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)**
**We believe our movement should be grounded in people — not special interests.** It's why Cori doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs, and it's how she's able to fight for people-first solutions in Congress like Medicare for All and student debt cancellation.
But that means we rely 100% on grassroots donations of $5, $10, or $15 to power our movement to re-elect the first activist from the movement in defense of Black lives elected to federal office.
**[It's really important we receive enough contributions to stay on track with our projections and ensure we have the resources to keep Cori in Congress — chip in $5 today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230226.MOG_SQ&refcode=em20230226-2242&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)**
Thank you,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230226?refcode=em20230226-2242-footer&t=23&refcode2=2242_1082990__oSG_F&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2242%2E1082990%2E_oSG_F)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Add your name if you agree: The Supreme Court must reinstate the Biden administration's student debt forgiveness program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ilhan for Congress
body:
This is a crisis — period. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59318819/393821940/-1230998127?refcode=em230226-30-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjU2MGVlOC0yMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNnQlFTrx7JNhW6Ve3vNFkRHnkw2QV4NG7wE0mEVnHI=&emci=0c30229d-04b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5b560ee8-20b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35610790)
---
Friends — This week, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in the Biden administration's case to reinstate the President's plan to cancel billions of dollars in student debt. A victory would result in more than 40 million Americans seeing up to $20,000 in student loans forgiven, and would wipe student debt entirely for 20 million people across the country. Our movement has fought long and hard for this for years, and with these Supreme Court hearings, we're once again at a critical fork in the road. Will we as a society forgive this debt and allow millions of people to learn, prosper, and grow? Or will we continue to punish millions with insurmountable debt for the crime of pursuing an education? This is an important moment for our movement to stand together on this issue, which is why I need to ask: [**Will you add your name to my petition calling on the Supreme Court to reinstate the Biden administration's student debt forgiveness program? Please make your voice heard, especially today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59318820/393821941/-1445852537?refcode2=5b560ee8-20b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230226-30-b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjU2MGVlOC0yMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNnQlFTrx7JNhW6Ve3vNFkRHnkw2QV4NG7wE0mEVnHI=&emci=0c30229d-04b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5b560ee8-20b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35610790) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59318821/393821942/-1445852537?refcode2=5b560ee8-20b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230226-30-b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjU2MGVlOC0yMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNnQlFTrx7JNhW6Ve3vNFkRHnkw2QV4NG7wE0mEVnHI=&emci=0c30229d-04b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5b560ee8-20b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35610790) I'll put it simply: The cost barriers to education in the United States are unacceptable. Today in America, over 40 million people are carrying over $1.8 trillion dollars in student loan debt. That figure has doubled in the past 10 years, and is more than double what the entire United States — federal, state, and local — will spend on public education this year _combined._ **This is a crisis — period.** I know the pain and the struggle that comes with overwhelming student loan and tuition payments personally. I would bet that I am one of only a handful in Congress who does. That pain and struggle is shared by millions of Americans each and every day — working people who have put aside buying a home, raising a family, starting a business, or following a dream because they did what we as a society have always told our young people to do: go to college. The obscene amount of debt in this country doesn't even account for the millions of people who are qualified, capable, and wanting to go to college who were forced not to because of the financial consequences. It is an outrage that we have allowed things to get to this point, especially at a time where the ultra-wealthy and large corporations continue to pay next to nothing — if anything — in federal taxes. Debt forgiveness would be an incredible victory for our movement, but at the same time, it cannot be the end of the road. $10 or $20,000 is a life-changing amount of money, but for millions of people, it only puts a small dent in the staggering amount of money they still owe. That's why our movement must continue our fight — not just for debt forgiveness, but for tuition-free college and education for all, regardless of one's income, ZIP code, or anything else. The right to an education is a fundamental component of a moral society, and I won't stop fighting until our agenda is a reality. So please: [**Will you join me in calling on the Supreme Court to reinstate the Biden administration's student debt forgiveness program? clean_body: This is a crisis — period. | Friends — This week, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in the Biden administration's case to reinstate the President's plan to cancel billions of dollars in student debt. A victory would result in more than 40 million Americans seeing up to $20,000 in student loans forgiven, and would wipe student debt entirely for 20 million people across the country. Our movement has fought long and hard for this for years, and with these Supreme Court hearings, we're once again at a critical fork in the road. Will we as a society forgive this debt and allow millions of people to learn, prosper, and grow? Or will we continue to punish millions with insurmountable debt for the crime of pursuing an education? This is an important moment for our movement to stand together on this issue, which is why I need to ask: I'll put it simply: The cost barriers to education in the United States are unacceptable. Today in America, over 40 million people are carrying over $1.8 trillion dollars in student loan debt. That figure has doubled in the past 10 years, and is more than double what the entire United States — federal, state, and local — will spend on public education this year combined. This is a crisis — period. I know the pain and the struggle that comes with overwhelming student loan and tuition payments personally. I would bet that I am one of only a handful in Congress who does. That pain and struggle is shared by millions of Americans each and every day — working people who have put aside buying a home, raising a family, starting a business, or following a dream because they did what we as a society have always told our young people to do: go to college. The obscene amount of debt in this country doesn't even account for the millions of people who are qualified, capable, and wanting to go to college who were forced not to because of the financial consequences. It is an outrage that we have allowed things to get to this point, especially at a time where the ultra-wealthy and large corporations continue to pay next to nothing — if anything — in federal taxes. Debt forgiveness would be an incredible victory for our movement, but at the same time, it cannot be the end of the road. $10 or $20,000 is a life-changing amount of money, but for millions of people, it only puts a small dent in the staggering amount of money they still owe. That's why our movement must continue our fight — not just for debt forgiveness, but for tuition-free college and education for all, regardless of one's income, ZIP code, or anything else. The right to an education is a fundamental component of a moral society, and I won't stop fighting until our agenda is a reality. So please: Debt-forgiveness and free education is an investment in our students, our people, our economy, our present and our future. Let's get it done. Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar Ilhan for Congress or ILHAN PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States | mailto:info@ilhanomar.com | | Paid for by Ilhan for Congress

subject: Democracy could be on the line in this important Wisconsin court race, giving us a rare chance to shift the balance of a court making vital decisions about voter rights and abortion access, that can set national court precedents or might turn the outcome of a presidential election.

| | | | | Peter, Last Tuesday’s primary delivered a stunning result in Wisconsin, where an amazing liberal (judicial races are "non-partisan") not only won, but beat her two GOP opponents combined in the open primary for a Supreme Court seat that determines if MAGA devotees or those devoted to the rule of law have final say over this ultimate swing state's electoral votes in 2024. **_Liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add 7.5% a second Democrat got, you see if we continue to fund and support Protasiewicz, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April._** **_[Celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4688e9cf-173c-46d0-b058-3447a5f5cb4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
