name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Our fight for justice for all does not begin or end with a committee assignment
body:
#
Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
**Earlier this month, after 4 proud years of service, I was removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee do absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Justice Democrats so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128321?refcode=em20230226-27693&t=1&akid=27693%2E1203867%2EPXhuGj)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128321?refcode=em20230226-27693&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27693%2E1203867%2EPXhuGj)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=27693%2E1203867%2EPXhuGj) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=27693%2E1203867%2EPXhuGj) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230226-27693-footer&t=23&refcode2=27693_1203867_PXhuGj&akid=27693%2E1203867%2EPXhuGj)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

HELP US RAISE $10,000 BY FEBRUARY 28** [DONATE NOW →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59296164/393792139/1580223838?refcode=E20397-20230227-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE4YjY1Yi1mOWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzbLlpK68F34jiZmskPq9KnndhG4xNxcH4YUSTRu6vs=) Friend — We’re facing an unprecedented number of attacks from extremist officials all across the country. We already know of fights in 4 states where extremist state legislators are coming after the ballot box in hopes of making it harder _or impossible_ to pass ballot measures before an abortion measure could ever make its way in front of voters. **Once these attacks become official, we _must_ be ready to fight back. So, we’ve set an emergency goal of $10,000 to power our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign (BMRC) Fund — our last line of defense when it comes to protecting direct democracy _AND_ abortion. [_If you want voters to hold onto the power of their vote, will you rush a donation now before Tuesday at midnight to power our BMRC Emergency Fund?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59296165/393792140/1580223838?refcode=E20397-20230227-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODE4YjY1Yi1mOWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzbLlpK68F34jiZmskPq9KnndhG4xNxcH4YUSTRu6vs=)** **In Ohio →** A 60% supermajority measure _(like Amendment C in South Dakota that we defeated last year!)_ could appear in front of voters as early as November. **In Oklahoma →** A measure could appear before voters that would make it _significantly harder_ to collect signatures and qualify a measure to appear on the ballot. **In Missouri →** The State House has passed legislation that would require a 60% supermajority to approve a voter-driven constitutional amendment. **AND, in Florida →** _A state that already has a 60% supermajority to pass ballot measures,_ a 67% SUPERmajority could make its way in front of voters as soon as this year. **We can and MUST be ready to fight back. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Milk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. **I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. **

_If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our February Goal and keep up with the Democrats ' massive war chest._

I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - **and we need it today.**

**All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. _[The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can contribute to reach my February goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366403:6Mzh-cGNp:m:1:3365131770:7B7E674CBC6A0952FB022B1B6734552C:r "The Democrats
rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to reach my February
goal.")_**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366403:6Mzh-cGNp:m:1:3365131770:7B7E674CBC6A0952FB022B1B6734552C:r "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. **But I can 't do this without support from folks like you.**

Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through,

Marco

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366405:6Mzh-cGNp:m:1:3365131770:7B7E674CBC6A0952FB022B1B6734552C:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**

DREAM")

filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366406:6Mzh-cGNp:m:1:3365131770:7B7E674CBC6A0952FB022B1B6734552C:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need

clean_body: | | | | Peter, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails? And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you. I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our February Goal and keep up with the Democrats ' massive war chest. I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. "The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to reach my February goal." | | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!" We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. But I can 't do this without support from folks like you. | | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!" This is the shortest month of the year, which means we have even less time than normal to reach our goal. "Please don’t ignore this call for help!" Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through, Marco | | | "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it." A Personal Note from Marco Rubio: My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream. I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal. However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it. "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:" | "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM" "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:" We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country. The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next: 1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other. 2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy. "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW."** | "STOP THE DEMS" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: ARE YOU COMING TOMORROW? THE CHESTERFIELD GOP WILL ELECT A NEW CHAIR TOMORROW NIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
PLEASE SUPPORT DEE DEE VANBUREN
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qdzdVX_j9aRdPtTHJCQHlPGWhKEomWFzZF1RjrujDzUU38cRU7CzQAS7itrg5kvF8V3h08osv0EZM2PHGIYrJhaycmjtkqrm13fbt4h83Snj55upPOp_Mxzl9koysfadvmhKWIz7ZaN6F7fZsiMjm2eU6BSjQQVWx19XgaAhkfI=&c=IuwOlJ1Dx4ki56jKVs2yi97y4k9Pgw5i8b4o6jsgCaIf2MeI0SNBVg==&ch=0FgsZ1HTCZwbIfqUl21Oy6dHIG4mrCfdSoPB3RToMtD9Svm03r1fAA==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Do you live in Chesterfield? VERY IMPORTANT MEETING Election of the next GOP Chair
---
| COME JOIN US
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

Tomorrow night the Chesterfield GOP will hold a business meeting for the purpose of electing a new GOP Chair and to elect new members, self included.

I'm encouraging my supporters to support
DeeDee VanBuren for Unit Chair. She served well as the President of the Huguenot Republican Women's Club and is committed to having regular monthly meetings, good communication and growing the Chesterfield GOP committee. I hope you will join me in supporting DeeDee VanBuren as unit chair. She understands the demanding time requirements of this volunteer position and will have the time to commit to do what it takes to ensure Chesterfield stays red.

I encourage you to attend and if you are not a member to please consider submitting your form along with a check at the meeting. If you don't have a form I will bring some with me. You can also print these off at [www.chesterfieldgop.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qdzdVX_j9aRdPtTHJCQHlPGWhKEomWFzZF1RjrujDzUU38cRU7CzQAd1vxELUDxYXIxCEBbZD2CpsfwSETcZvaKoGeLXGKIHW1ATyxxjoZVe12ewOk9NpxL6w4S_vx8Z6l9uW9TbVxxJeRBueaMZZtI79WXnsad6&c=IuwOlJ1Dx4ki56jKVs2yi97y4k9Pgw5i8b4o6jsgCaIf2MeI0SNBVg==&ch=0FgsZ1HTCZwbIfqUl21Oy6dHIG4mrCfdSoPB3RToMtD9Svm03r1fAA==).

Also, at our next Chesterfield VA Tea Party, please join us for a legislative update about what really happened during the 2023 legislative short session at the Great American Ranch. All legislators and candidates are welcome and should RSVP to Debbie and debbie@chaseforva.com if they would like to speak.

Look forward to seeing you there!
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase
FEB 27 NEXT CHESTERFIELD GOP BUSINESS MEETING

name: Senator Scott
subject: This is what happens when you challenge Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366303:JTIz-cGNA:m:1:3331421248:A21002FF5761EFB05BD5AA274580BA9C:r)
---

---
| | Thank you, Senator Scott

subject: Team, we’ll cut right to the chase.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress

The primaries are crucial for true representation of our communities.

body:
Taking on debt was the right strategic choice for victory. Now, we have to handle it.
| | |
---
Hello,
The law requires that we make our campaign finances public every quarter. When that happens, the status of the debt we took on in order to win here in New Hampshire will be made public.
**[Please: chip in $3 or as much as you can before tonight’s internal check-in deadline to help our (victorious!) campaign pay down our debt.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59297935/393797005/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2216-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTBmMDM2Mi1mZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWDZmEsG1pktLQkCNWZFME8LR0f8dMIWuJj8zFw1uAU=)**
The amount we raise at this point will say a lot about our campaign, and I’m hoping that I can count on you to help chip away at it.
In the final days of 2022, I was getting calls from other Senators and top-level operatives asking whether we could still really win in New Hampshire. Polls were tightening, pundits had our race as a toss-up, and the GOP was spending millions upon millions to defeat me.
Taking on debt was the right strategic choice for victory. Now, we have to handle it.
**[If I can count on you for $3, it would be a great help. Will you please help before tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59297936/393797025/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2216-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTBmMDM2Mi1mZmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWDZmEsG1pktLQkCNWZFME8LR0f8dMIWuJj8zFw1uAU=)**

When that happens, the status of the debt we took on in order to win here in New Hampshire will be made public. = The amount we raise at this point will say a lot about our campaign, and I’m hoping that I can count on you to help chip away at it. In the final days of 2022, I was getting calls from other Senators and top-level operatives asking whether we could still really win in New Hampshire. Polls were tightening, pundits had our race as a toss-up, and the GOP was spending millions upon millions to defeat me. Taking on debt was the right strategic choice for victory. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: ICYMI: New poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A brand-new LA Times poll reports a “tight race” for CA Senate. Katie needs your support.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)
This is huge news, Derek...
The LA Times just released a brand-new poll of the Democratic contenders to be California’s next U.S. Senator, and**Katie is trailing the leader by just two points.**
Adam Schiff: 22%
Katie Porter: 20% (-2)
---
**[We can’t let this gap get any wider. Please, will you donate $5 or more right now to put your support behind Katie and close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-1&refcode2=18354_3422442_DPeJuZ&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)**
**[Donate Now ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230226-1?refcode=EMAF26_1_POLL_20230226_V1_F&refcode2=18354_3422442_DPeJuZ&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)**
Here’s another important fact from this poll: Almost HALF of Democratic voters are undecided in our race.
Derek, we know we have what it takes to win over those voters.
But this race has three serious contenders and counting...and in an ultra-crowded primary, the only way to ensure victory is to raise serious grassroots resources to reach those millions of undecided voters across California. Are you with us?
**[Grassroots donors like you could decide the outcome of this race and make Katie the next U.S. Senator from California. Please rush a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230226-1?refcode=em20230226-1&refcode2=18354_3422442_DPeJuZ&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230226-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF26_1_POLL_20230226_V1_F&refcode2=18354_3422442_DPeJuZ&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)**
Let’s seize this moment and show our strength,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF26_1_POLL_20230226_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18354_3422442_DPeJuZ&akid=18354%2E3422442%2EDPeJuZ)**

| |
---
**Attorney General Miyares enjoyed spending time in Farmville this week. He had the opportunity to meet with the president of Hampden-Sydney College, the president of Longwood University, visit FACES food pantry, and host a law enforcement officer roundtable. AG Miyares also spoke with members of the Farmville Area Chamber of Commerce before taking a tour of the Moton Museum. **
---
**Hampden-Sydney College**
---
---
---
_While at Hampden-Sydney College, Attorney General Miyares also enjoyed talking directly with students._
---
---
AG Miyares loves the opportunity to speak with and hear from some of Virginia’s future leaders!
---
|
---
| | **LEO Roundtable**
---
---
| |
---
---
While at Hampden-Sydney College, AG Miyares held a law enforcement officer roundtable and enjoyed a productive discussion with regional LEOs.

---

_[**FACES Food Pantry**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=db9669cb9a564f17bd9bc80f6e4d9e42&_e=Xa9e4b12ZehZIO4SZ3793kXwU23iTTGzOXYnIrJNWfXGPYDbr_UDFr3yn6Q6PZOBWGjCTgfpaDoHGXE6IZaMP0vULenYxREa1xqpb_-7khFiFr_FlQkVn5PXx3oLzj7Xt8dnMIxoV7BteJ7bo7nEUj8lTJ6B6oVF8PM_g2_IdzAEc9YoS6C3YuC6qxFqW-QOaafwA3lTpR9NqGn6rgmWtA%3D%3D)_**is a crown jewel in the Farmville community, distributing food to an average of 900 households annually. ** **_These households represent _****_more than 1,800 Virginians!_** **In addition to serving so many Virginians, FACES Food Pantry prides themselves on operating with an all-volunteer staff from throughout the Farmville community. Thank you for helping to ensure no one in your community goes to sleep at night hungry.**

| [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=db9669cb9a564f17bd9bc80f6e4d9e42&_e=Xa9e4b12ZehZIO4SZ3793n8wDbO9ZQrPYskKAOJ2q7J_AcZ22oQsqIJeYvQPF3rNvn70Xysh33TcvecAwYHKHemEQDYYBqFs7DOMF8awEHuw9NiOExguHAOJK8i1HiAXKyuE-8fm9KCyA4zArm8tWNWiR-xbv_Z3flfNEG8sL5tny_wLZYiwJT8Yfap5DHEC3KPyj5ruqczB81IpIre_Pg%3D%3D)

| | _The next time you find yourself in the Farmville area, take time to visit the Moton Museum and learn about the significant role Virginians played in America’s integration of public education._

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: The struggle for voting rights throughout Black history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
This month, Fair Fight Action is reflecting on the struggle for voting rights throughout Black history. Keep reading to learn more:

A brief history lesson:

For hundreds of years, Black people have been systematically excluded from the voting process by white lawmakers, in a successful effort to suppress their fundamental rights. Courageous Black activists fought to gain the right to vote and the basic human freedoms that are intrinsically tied to it. From the end of slavery until the 1960s, Jim Crow laws were brutally enforced to segregate Black people — denying the right to vote, hold jobs, access education, and more. In 1965, the Voting Rights Act enshrined Black voting rights into law on the surface.

The status of voting rights today:

The historic Jim Crow-era barriers to voting did not automatically come crashing down with the passage of the Voting Rights Act. Previously there were “poll taxes,” and now we see restrictive voter ID laws. Previously there were “literacy tests,” and now we see voters’ registration purged. Previously there were “white primaries,” and now we see polling locations close down in primarily Black neighborhoods. Black people still face unfair, deliberate hurdles to exercising their freedom to vote.

What Fair Fight Action is doing about it:

Fair Fight Action is committed to combating Jim Crow 2.0 — the systemic barriers that limit Black people from voting freely. We’re committed to stopping the voter suppression bills that anti-democratic, extremist politicians continue to impose on voters of color. This Black History Month and every month, we’re deeply committed to starting a new chapter in our history and protecting our sacred right to vote.

In honor of Black History Month, will you chip in today to power Fair Fight Action’s mission to empower and protect the voting rights of Black Americans?

DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ffabhm23]

Thank you for your support!
— The Fair Fight Action Team

**Emilia’s former opponent, a Trump-backed, anti-choice, Fox News commentator just filed to run again.**

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Shine the Light of Jesus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366358:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r)
---

We must fight to have the right - wherever we may be - to display that biblical command to shine the light of Jesus upon our earth and pray for our salvation.

In recent years, _**this sacred right has been under siege like never before.**_

During the pandemic, we saw Democrat politicians force our churches and synagogues to close while keeping abortion clinics and liquor stores open.

And, just this past year, we saw Coach Kennedy, a high school football coach, fired from his job for the simple act of praying alone on the field.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366358:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r)
---

When people of faith face injustices like these, we must not give in, we must not waiver - instead, **we must stand up for religious freedom _no matter the cost._**

That's why I've been working overtime to defend our right to pray and ensure that places of worship are never shut down again.

---
| | [DEFEND RELIGIOUS FREEDOM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366358:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r)
---

If you are inclined to join me in this endeavor, __**[I'd greatly appreciate you sparing whatever you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366359:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r "I'd greatly
appreciate you sparing whatever you can.")**__

_No person should ever be discriminated against for living out their faith._

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366358:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366360:60LadcGTN:m:1:3331421248:23C822272E964F0BDE7B4AB0707ACB3A:r "If you love

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: You're invited to the 2nd Annual "A Seat at the Table" Conference
body:
[https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/c/eJxskD1PxDAMQH9NM1ap3STtkAEJVcBJIAYkmE5p7OQC_VLT44Bfj3oTA6v19Gw_f0xk1cb-9nDeXh_Ph6-3S63en54FWd24FpVgW2ljamwkGsGjS8Nx-17YejcuLsXpz2yXaeTABOAktSqooGpVVx4acbLcM2gJdRWMkdhiQ8qhNlVAT8GYRiQLElAC6KqVEk3ZBKlkxQwVq8DaFLUcY-my54kcfabMay79PIrBnrZtyQXeFNAV0OVtXl3kMs5zHNgt6YoV0I055onWArq-f1EfK9K8bjq09_3PQ7zbAabkCuj2P4J0FAwCGYAAzhvEplymKIb5Gu4_hVgtLZc0DClf7417nX35bwAAAP__HG1y3g]

Peter,

You are invited to the second annual “A Seat At The Table” conference to be held at The Palace in Somerset, NJ, on Thursday, April
27th 2023.

This unique event is a full day program curated by several Republican county committee members and activists, seeking to give us
all “A Seat at the Table” as we work to change NJ and restore America.

The goal is to connect New Jersey patriots with national voices who will encourage, educate, and motivate us in our fight for
common sense government. New Jersey is
rising and “We The People” are fighting to take back our state from its liberal descent.

The theme this year is “Choose Freedom” and there will be a full day of panels and special speakers as well as a special VIP
Cocktail Reception in that theme.

Our panels for the day will focus on:

* Freedom to Worship
* Freedom to Speak
* Freedom to Parent
* Freedom to Be Secure
* Freedom to Prosper
* Freedom to Vote

Check out the website for a list of speakers [https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/c/eJxMz71O8zAUxvGricfIOf6IM3h4pVcRUAnEgARTdWIfp26TJrJdAlw9SifWZ3j--rlj9FYVcv8Pt_L-fDt8fWxSnV9embfaYCcUI9votpXCcNEymjFOx_K9knU4rxjH659tP9OCAnkA5L5TQQUllWwcGHayQQs0hgjIkJHD0AzaCBm8ds4hIWfRAgfBAXTTcS7a2gSueEMEDalAuq0kn8cas6OrR_8ZM6Vcu2Vmkz2VsuZK_Kugr6Dftq3GjKVcz_WSxgr6vBJeKOUKejYtd_cwvKlLEn5JRYfucfh5Gh9Ysn7d4jTFfM-NO25P_AYAAP__nahfUw] as they are added, but some highlights include:

Sebastian and Katie Gorka, Bill Spadea, Gavin Wax, Paul Teller, Gordon Chang, Dr. Rafael Cruz, Dr. Chuck Harding, Tiffany Justice,
Brandon Straka, Corey DeAngelis, Ken Blackwell, Cleta Mitchell, Tom Homan, and so many more!

After the day session there will be a VIP cocktail reception, giving you time to interact with these important voices in the fight
for the future of our country as well as hear from a special guest, to be announced soon.

The registration page at asattnj.org [https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/c/eJxMz8FOhDAQxvGnoUcyTJkChx5MDFE30Xgw0dOmtFO2Kyyk7Yr69IY9ef0O3z8_ewxOU2Z7f7jm9-fr4ftjq-n88iqcVq3pJAnWlWqaWrYgG8GzCdMx_6ysrZlXE8bLv20_U5I9O0QDriNPnmqqK4utOGnL3pnWYYduQNPZigmkUrYeCFhJEEEjoAREVXUAsilbDwQVM1ZMnlVT1DCPpUmWL864r5A4ptIus5j0Kec1FfKuwL7Aftu20iST8-VcLnEssI88hpQ5FtiLabm5h-GNPqN0S8zKd4_D79P4IKJ26xamKaRbbtxxe-IvAAD__0NSXrs] has full ticket information.

Don’t wait...space is limited, and tickets are selling quickly.

ENTER THE SPECIAL PROMO CODE BELOW to save 15% on any ticket.

PROMO CODE: JERSEYRISING15

Thank you for all you do as a fellow patriot. Hope to see you on April 27th

To unsubscribe click: <https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/u/eJxMzrFOwzAQxvGnqcfqcpdz4sEDEgNQCcSABFPl-M7BkDRR4lLg6VEzsX7S_9MvHrN4LhpvD-fy-ng-fL9dav54ejbibRscsdEx5OFYfmb1MYxzyP3p33btLWlSQQwgjhMnrrmuIrbm3Qu2StYmpVZjJNQoQcg6aOoOgILJHgEJEG3lAKjZtwkYKlWslJPaZlfD2O_DGvUkQb7yqsu6j9NohmnDd90Lfy4k01Jscvfd70N_ZxYv8yUPQ163g_7K3aLid3jzFwAA__-iOk3n>

name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Why Andy ran for governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Help Andy continue leading us toward a bigger and better tomorrow. Peter,

In a moment, [**I want to ask you to join me in supporting Andy by chipping in to his re-election campaign before his end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59300026/393803364/-500812825?refcode=em23_230226_eom1_fnd_gq_nopn___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230226_eom1_fnd_gq_nopn___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGEzNmVjMy0wN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tff1aWQb7koXZ8ERFNCKYnPTj8CK44KyYyLub97og9M=) But first, I want to think back to 2019.

I remember the moment we knew Andy had won. I recall the hope and uplifting spirit we all felt as Andy delivered his victory speech to a crowd of supporters.

**Andy ran for governor in 2019 because he knew he had what it took to lead our Commonwealth forward at a time when political divisions nationwide never seemed wider.**

He ran to fight for every Kentuckian — whether you live in rural or urban Kentucky or eastern, western, northern, or central Kentucky. Andy has united us through our shared values: hard work, faith, and belief in a bigger and better tomorrow.

And by coming together, our Commonwealth has made great strides forward. These have been some of the most prosperous years for Kentucky. I know that Andy is determined to continue making progress for our Commonwealth – but he has another tough fight ahead of him.

Andy is facing 12 Republican opponents, and the attacks against him have already started. We're once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to ensure Andy has the resources to win this reelection for the people of Kentucky. Can we count on you?

[**Help Andy continue leading us toward a bigger and better tomorrow. clean_body: Help Andy continue leading us toward a bigger and better tomorrow. Peter, In a moment, = But first, I want to think back to 2019. I remember the moment we knew Andy had won. I recall the hope and uplifting spirit we all felt as Andy delivered his victory speech to a crowd of supporters. Andy ran for governor in 2019 because he knew he had what it took to lead our Commonwealth forward at a time when political divisions nationwide never seemed wider. He ran to fight for every Kentuckian — whether you live in rural or urban Kentucky or eastern, western, northern, or central Kentucky. Andy has united us through our shared values: hard work, faith, and belief in a bigger and better tomorrow. And by coming together, our Commonwealth has made great strides forward. These have been some of the most prosperous years for Kentucky. I know that Andy is determined to continue making progress for our Commonwealth – but he has another tough fight ahead of him. Andy is facing 12 Republican opponents, and the attacks against him have already started. We're once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to ensure Andy has the resources to win this reelection for the people of Kentucky. Can we count on you? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thank you for your time, Britainy Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

They used the example of a Canadian shop teacher who identifies as a trans woman and wears large prosthetic breasts while teaching children. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Can you dig deep to help our movement stay on track?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
We'll be quick: With February coming to an end in just two days, my team has told me that we're 24% short of our monthly fundraising goal — **$70,000 by 11:59pm on February 28th.** Unlike the vast majority of representatives in Congress, I have not, and will never, accept a dime of corporate money.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38273?t=1&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)
**There's a better way forward and it starts with our grassroots supporters like you, Peter.**
**[That's why I'm asking today: If you're able to, can you dig deep and chip in $3 or any amount to help our campaign stay on track to reach $70,000 by the end of the month?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38263?refcode=em20230226-2214&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38263?refcode=em20230226-2214&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)**
Donations from our grassroots supporters have allowed us to expand and diversify our people-powered coalition and have helped us secure many of the progressive victories we've seen in the last couple of years.
Now we must work together to protect our hard-fought victories from the GOP majority that wants to reverse all of the progress we were able to make wih your support.
We won't allow this to happen. Our movement has been delivering for working class people across the country and will continue to do so — but that takes major resources to sustain. [**With only two days left this month, will you pitch in today to help us reach our $70,000 February goal and make a difference for our movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38263?refcode=em20230226-2214&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38263?refcode=em20230226-2214&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230226-2214-footer&t=24&refcode2=2214_420207_Z8TnxL&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2214%2E420207%2EZ8TnxL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Unlike the vast majority of representatives in Congress, I have not, and will never, accept a dime of corporate money. There's a better way forward and it starts with our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. Donations from our grassroots supporters have allowed us to expand and diversify our people-powered coalition and have helped us secure many of the progressive victories we've seen in the last couple of years. Now we must work together to protect our hard-fought victories from the GOP majority that wants to reverse all of the progress we were able to make wih your support. We won't allow this to happen. Our movement has been delivering for working class people across the country and will continue to do so — but that takes major resources to sustain. Thank you for your continued support, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

So far, this year has been a whirlwind, and we have so much to be thankful for. I'm so proud of the way that Dan is stepping up to take on the extremists in Congress and fight for our democracy. He's working tirelessly in Washington and across the district to deliver for families and our future, and I’m so proud our kids can watch him serve our city and this country. So I thought it’s only right that we do something special for him to show our appreciation.
I love birthdays and the kids and I always try to do something unexpected for his birthday. But when I asked him what he wanted this year, his only request was to sleep in! So I’m happy to do this for him and hope you can help make his birthday special with a small donation.
**Dan’s birthday is our chance to show him how much we appreciate the work he is doing. Will you help us make his first birthday as a Congressman a special one and chip in as a birthday supporter?**

clean_body: Let’s make Dan’s birthday a special one. | Hi Peter, Today is Dan’s birthday, and I wanted to surprise him by reaching out to our friends and top supporters to ask everyone to chip in to make this birthday memorable. I'm asking you, Peter, to help us celebrate Dan’s 47th birthday by chipping in $4.70, $47, or any amount that’s meaningful to you to show him we have his back as he fights to preserve the rule of law and our democratic institutions from extremist, MAGA Republicans and to deliver for New Yorkers. | = = = So far, this year has been a whirlwind, and we have so much to be thankful for. I'm so proud of the way that Dan is stepping up to take on the extremists in Congress and fight for our democracy. He's working tirelessly in Washington and across the district to deliver for families and our future, and I’m so proud our kids can watch him serve our city and this country. So I thought it’s only right that we do something special for him to show our appreciation. I love birthdays and the kids and I always try to do something unexpected for his birthday. But when I asked him what he wanted this year, his only request was to sleep in! So I’m happy to do this for him and hope you can help make his birthday special with a small donation. Dan’s birthday is our chance to show him how much we appreciate the work he is doing. Will you help us make his first birthday as a Congressman a special one and chip in as a birthday supporter? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you. I’m sure seeing your name will mean a lot to Dan. Best, Corinne Goldman Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Milk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. **I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. **

_If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our February Goal and keep up with the Democrats ' massive war chest._

I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - **and we need it today.**

**All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. _[The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can contribute to reach my February goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366453:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "The Democrats rely
on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to reach my February
goal.")_**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366453:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "CHIP IN THE
PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. **But I can 't do this without support from folks like you.**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366453:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "CHIP IN THE
PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
This is the shortest month of the year, which means we have even less time than normal to reach our goal. **_[Please don't ignore this call for help!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366454:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "Please
don’t ignore this call for help!")_**

Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through,

Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366455:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose
ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366455:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366455:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366456:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366456:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366456:JKuAHcGBN:m:1:3331421248:A510B9E5DD6EB255892AA35EDFBCFA44:r "STOP THE DEMS")

| Peter,

I’m so sorry to email you on a Sunday, but we’re just two days from our critical February fundraising deadline, and we’re not quite on track to reach our must-hit goal.

This was the most expensive House race in Pennsylvania in 2022, and you can bet Republicans are already preparing to spend even more this time around in their efforts to defeat me and hold on to their majority. | Our Republic is in serious trouble and our God given liberties are under constant attack by radical marxist Democrats. clean_body: | | | | | | I am now out of session, I can now fundraise, and I can finally fully commit my time to the campaign! | == == == If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | ** I NEED YOU AND ALL YOUR FRIENDS TO SIGN UP TO BE A DELEGATE FOR MAY 6 CONVENTION == | Our Republic is in serious trouble and our God given liberties are under constant attack by radical marxist Democrats. I am in the fight working on big issues, but I am going to take a moment at the risk of being very redundant to respond to a ridiculous email sent by my so called "Republican" opponent. I will set the record straight. Please share this == with folks in the future who need to be informed! | #democratduane | Dear Friend, It would be an honor to continue to serve you in the the Virginia State Senate. I am a Republican with a reputation of working hard, a reputation of getting things done, and I have a reputation of successfully uniting our party to help other Republicans win ever since I was first elected in 2017. My list of seventy endorsements is proof of that.( ==) As a Republican, I have never wavered, and I am one of just nine lawmakers of the entire 140 member Virginia General Assembly to earn the American Conservative Union's (ACU) highest award for Conservative Excellence for my voting record. I do not put my finger in the air to see which way the wind is blowing and flip-flop. I have a biblical worldview and I stand on principle. You can rest assured that I will continue to fight hard for you and serve as a leading conservative voice for you in Senate District 10. My work ethic, results, and experience will not matter if you do not sign up at www.john4va.com to be a delegate for my May 6 Senate District 10 Convention. Please spread the word. == to read about convention shenanigans. == for my 2023 legislation. While I was in session doing the people's work to get a budget, protect life, protect our Second Amendment, keep boys out of girls bathrooms, get pornography out of school libraries, fight to pass Sage's law, lower taxes, help homeschoolers, and much more in the Virginia House of Delegates, my three-time Democrat opponent, now "Republican" Supervisor Duane Adams of Louisa County, thought it was a good idea to take another page out of the Democrat playbook and play the victim by misleading voters via email. We all know what Democrats accuse us of is what they are doing. Here is a breakdown of my opponents ridiculous email: Duane wrote: "John McGuire has focused every fiber of his campaign for State Senate on attacking me personally, attacking my family, and lying about my record. Meanwhile, he hides from his own disturbing record in the Virginia General Assembly." I fully stand behind my solid conservative voting record in the General Assembly. I've been to over 300 churches since I got started in 2017, and I have attended just about every Republican event I can find. At the bottom of every one of my newsletters is a link to my previous newsletters. my last newsletter, to see how busy I've been around the district, and let me know what you think. Duane accuses me of being a liar for saying he ran in Senate District 10 as a Democrat. When Bill Clinton was in office, my three-time Democrat opponent, Duane Adams, ran against Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove in Hanover County (in Senate District 10) on the Democrat ticket, with Mary Sue Terry, against George Allen. Duane is now running as a Republican against me and he considers me exposing his record a personal attack. Perhaps he is desperate and does not want you to know. == | == | Duane wrote: "However, for the past year I have been attacked and maligned by another candidate in this race and I believe the time has come to say enough is enough." Somebody please tell Duane, exposing your opponent's record as a flip-flopper because he ran as a Republican, and then he ran three times as a Democrat, is not a personal attack on him or his family. Duane wrote: "He feels it is necessary to mention that 30 years ago I was a conservative Reagan Democrat (something I have never hid), but neglects to mention the fact that I left the Democratic Party in 1993 and have been a conservative Republican for the last 30 years. Yet somehow, John McGuire tries to portray me as a "liberal Democrat," all while ignoring the fact that President Ronald Reagan was a former Democrat and that President Trump was a Democrat until 2009." | 1984 | == | Duane ran for Delegate as a Democrat the same year Democrat Robert Byrd and Democrat Walter Mondale were on the ticket against President Reagan. You have got to be some kind of salesman to tell people you are a Reagan Democrat when you left Reagan to run against Reagan. How can you call yourself a Reagan Democrat, when you jumped ship and left the Republican Party under Reagan and ran as a Democrat for Delegate the year pro-choice socialist, Democrat Walter Mondale, was on the ticket against Ronald Reagan in 1984 ==? Also, Reagan and Trump never hid they were Democrats and neither ever ran as a Democrat. Duane wants us to believe the moment Republican Frank Hargrove beat him in Hanover County in 1993, he became a Republican the next day. But he still governs like a Democrat by raising taxes each year in Louisa County. We have enough Tax and Spend Democrats in Richmond. | | I went to the Louisa BOS website to take notes and look at the budget to see how much real estate taxes have been raised, almost 40%, since Duane was elected. Everything is more expensive these days and people are struggling. He could have lowered the rate to give folks in Louisa a break, but he didn't. We have enough Tax and Spend Democrats in Richmond. On the campaign trail, he keeps talking about all the money he gave to this group and that group without raising taxes. Folks, he gave them your money. By the way, no one in Louisa County, including myself, knew Duane ever voted Democrat or ran as a Democrat when he ran for the Board of Supervisors in 2017, with the exception, apparently, Graven Craig. The people of Louisa County are just now starting to find out, and Duane Adams is not happy about it. Duane Wrote: "The fact of the matter is that I will not be lectured about what it means to be a conservative Republican by John McGuire who co-sponsored the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) which would enshrine the "right to abortion" into our federal constitution along with taxpayer funding of abortion." | 6 Votes Against the ERA Links | == | == | == | == | == | == | Life is a miracle and it begins at conception. I have never wavered on this issue, and I never will. Duane fails to mention I never voted for the ERA, and in fact, I voted against the ERA every time. He also fails to mention I have introduced pro-life legislation, including a bill to permanently defund Planned Parenthood, and I have a perfect pro-life voting record all of my six years in the Virginia House of Delegates. In past elections, I received the Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL) endorsement, the Students for Life Endorsement, and I have a 100 Family Foundation Score. For my floor speech on Life Begins at Conception, ==. Duane Wrote: "I will also not be lectured about what it means to be a conservative by John McGuire while he has openly attended an anti-gun rally with democrats like Ralph Northam and Mark Herring." Duane sounds like the kind of person who will read a news article and believe a leftist reporter's view on what they think you might have meant, or said, or thought. "Shall not be infringed" is pretty simple. I have never wavered on our Second Amendment and I never will. Duane fails to mention my VCDL score is 100 every year, I've previously been endorsed by the VCDL and NRA ILA, I've introduced plenty of pro-gun bills, including constitutional carry and sovereign immunity. I have a perfect pro-gun voting record each year in the General Assembly.Click here for my pro-gun ==. Duane wrote: "John McGuire has been spreading lies about me because he cannot stand on his own record. And the manner in which he has been spreading lies is cowardly. I've asked him to debate me many times and he won't. He's hiding behind his computer screen instead of standing on a stage and talking about our records." First of all, Duane fails to mention we have recently attended Candidate forums together in several counties for Senate District 10 while I was in session as a Member of the House of Delegates. And Duane, to my knowledge, has never asked me to debate. We rarely speak to each other, but he did approach me at the Appomattox Candidate Forum the other day and said to me, "You sounded whiny on the radio and it was embarrassing." Clearly, I struck a nerve when I pointed out the truth on the John Frederick's Radio Show that he ran as a Democrat three times. I stand by my comments on the radio. Again, take a listen for yourself to that interview and let me know what you think ==. Has Duane ever served in the military? Because I have. Duane likes to call people a coward. Would it surprise you to find out Duane also calls his constituents a coward? Imagine your State Senator calling you a coward. Check out this email response from Duane to a constituent, where he calls this constituent a coward. The message is clear, don't question Duane, or else! | | My conservative voting record is solid. Our country is hanging by a string and we are in big trouble. I am working hard with other Republicans to help pass Governor Youngkin's agenda. I am working with Senator Amanda Chase, Delegate Buddy Fowler, Delegate Tommy Wright, Delegate James Edmunds, Delegate Matt Fariss, and many others to do something about the problems we face in Richmond. We are losing our country because fellow Republicans cannot put petty differences aside and work together for the greater good. Duane mentions three endorsements: I give Delegate Nick Freitas the benefit of the doubt because according to him, he did not realize Duane was running against me and I really do not think Nick knew Duane Adams ran as a Democrat. Senator Bryce Reeves, a man considered Virginia's version of Liz Cheney because he voted with the Democrats to censure Senator Amanda Chase and he voted with Democrats on a radical progressive bill HB 257 The Predator Protection Act, a bill that allowed the Loudon County School Superintendant to cover up the attack by a boy on a girl in a girls school bathroom, is supporting Duane. I wonder why? Maybe Bob Good doesn't know Duane's record. You should ask him. I do know Duane's constituents are very upset he voted, "yes", on the Lake Anna Resort Complex Development over their objection, and the ten million dollar Waste Water Treatment Facility for his donors. Just about everyone constituent during public comment was vehemently against the decision, especially after he was asked to recuse himself because he took money from the out of state contractors for his campaign. I've heard some constituents are so upset they are petitioning to have Supervisor Adams recalled. Again, I am one of just nine lawmakers of the entire 140 member Virginia General Assembly to earn ACU's highest award for Conservative Excellence for my voting record. After looking at these facts you can see Duane's slanderous accusations against me are nothing but the desperate actions from a flailing campaign. I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will hold him accountable for his record. my American Conservative Union Endorsement. | SD 10 Convention Update | Let's make it fun! We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham County High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form. Please print the PDF form here ==, fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE. Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

subject: I answer to the people of Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Joe Biden wants me to serve his far-Left agenda.

The DC bureaucracy wants me to serve their bloated wallets. Mitch McConnell kicked me off a committee because I challenged him for Leader of the Senate.

And I said no to all of them.

**I only serve one group, Peter, and that’s the hardworking people of Florida. **

_But doing the right thing in Washington has made me a lot of enemies, and now, the Washington insiders won’t stop their attacks on me._

_That’s why I need your help._

[**2024 is closer than we think, and we need all hands on deck if we’re going to win this race. | Peter,

Our February deadline is just around the corner, and our team needs your support to reach our $2,000 goal. In a moment, I’ll explain why it’s so important for us to reach this goal, but first, I have to ask: [_**will you chip in $1 or more today ahead of Tuesday’s deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59310302/393816239/1955960297?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230225-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQyYzZjZS0xNWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOi1BHztz_OALQgN-u6eye2Cae5QiSjkbm0DUiNFLt8=)

Though we won some critical races in last year’s midterm elections, we no longer hold the House majority, and our majority in the Senate is slim. Right now, we need to build a strong foundation for the upcoming election cycle so we’re prepared for whatever comes our way.

Last year, Republicans spent millions of dollars across the country, and we can expect them to do the same next year. Rural districts will be especially important next year, as many of the key seats we need to win are in rural communities, so we must do all we can now to ensure these candidates have the resources they need to win big.

[_**So, Peter, will you contribute $1 or more before our February deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59310306/393816242/1955960297?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230225-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQyYzZjZS0xNWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOi1BHztz_OALQgN-u6eye2Cae5QiSjkbm0DUiNFLt8=)

clean_body: Right now, we need to build a strong foundation for the upcoming election cycle so we’re prepared for whatever comes our way. | = | Peter, Our February deadline is just around the corner, and our team needs your support to reach our $2,000 goal. In a moment, I’ll explain why it’s so important for us to reach this goal, but first, I have to ask: = | = | = Though we won some critical races in last year’s midterm elections, we no longer hold the House majority, and our majority in the Senate is slim. Right now, we need to build a strong foundation for the upcoming election cycle so we’re prepared for whatever comes our way. Last year, Republicans spent millions of dollars across the country, and we can expect them to do the same next year. Rural districts will be especially important next year, as many of the key seats we need to win are in rural communities, so we must do all we can now to ensure these candidates have the resources they need to win big. = | = | = With appreciation, Tedra * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley doesn’t know the Missouri I know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me show you why:
#
Peter — Josh Hawley doesn’t know the Missouri I know.
Before I ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward our end-of-month goal of raising 5,000 individual donations,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) let me show you a few reasons why:**
On the left is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the right.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who’s willing and able to fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount toward our end-of-month goal right now so we can start this campaign off strong and get our message in front of voters? Flipping this U.S. Senate seat will only be possible if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and early support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28069?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28068?refcode=em20230226-2834&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230226-2834-footer&t=15&refcode2=2834_614464_n4TeCR&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=2834%2E614464%2En4TeCR). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, when he was up for reelection in 2018. Cruz only held off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, we can absolutely beat him in '24. With so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST.
body:
Defend the Senate in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24f17e1c-2389-4f5e-b306-966f0d840fbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Ted Cruz is one of the most despicable, heartless people to ever serve in the Senate. Of this, I have no doubt.** _When his constituents' kids were murdered while in school at Uvalde, he ignored guns and, in a slap in the face to victims and survivors, said we must strengthen "doors." When his constituents were freezing to death because of corrupt Republican deals, he responded by going to a luxury resort in Cancun. _ From the NY Times: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0db74832-5b2b-4cde-bdf3-4107b4ad3814/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e9be756-6f4b-4e5f-b288-85a727f4314b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Worst of all, Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. He voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11318baa-03e2-45bc-909b-55052ca56d62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, he inspires Democrats to vote against him, repels Independents & convinces Republicans to be Democrats for a day._** **_We absolutely can beat him in '24, and with so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabf4d55f-84a5-4980-a0ac-eb93d97ab609/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on one of the most dangerous elected officials in America._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fbfd0bf-f64f-4926-a0d6-728acf2db1e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Priscilla Ferebee
subject: real quick can you sign Jazz’s card?
body:
Jazz Lewis, Democrat for Progress

Hey team, it’s Priscilla, Jazz’s mom.

I just wanted to chime in on Jazz’s birthday to make sure you signed his surprise birthday card.
SIGN HERE » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2]

Jazz is always on the move this time of year bouncing between the House floor and the committee room, working harder than ever to make Maryland a better place for all of us. And yet he still tries to run home from Annapolis to tuck Miguel in every night or brings him along to community events over the weekend.

Now it’s time for us to show our support for all his hard work. I hope you’ll take a minute to sign Jazz’s surprise birthday card.

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2]

Thanks for being part of the team,

Priscilla Ferebee, Jazz’s mom

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

I learned from a young age that not everyone in this country has the same opportunity for the American Dream.

My parents were sent to Japanese American internment camps. I’ve faced discrimination myself – as an openly gay Asian American man, many have targeted me because of who I am.

I’ve spent my time in Congress trying to level the playing field for people who have been marginalized, underserved, and discriminated against.

**But the Republican Party has fought me at every turn – and now that they hold the majority, it will be no different.** My advocacy has made me a top MAGA Republican target, so that’s why I’m reaching out to you.

**[We’re still $2,506 short of Tuesday's end of month goal with just a few days left to make up the difference. clean_body: our collective power | = | = I learned from a young age that not everyone in this country has the same opportunity for the American Dream. My parents were sent to Japanese American internment camps. I’ve faced discrimination myself – as an openly gay Asian American man, many have targeted me because of who I am. I’ve spent my time in Congress trying to level the playing field for people who have been marginalized, underserved, and discriminated against. But the Republican Party has fought me at every turn – and now that they hold the majority, it will be no different. My advocacy has made me a top MAGA Republican target, so that’s why I’m reaching out to you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Friend, national Republicans are attacking Sen. Jacky Rosen (D-NV) with everything they’ve got, and she's counting on your urgent grassroots support to fight back. Here's why:
* With _FiveThirtyEight_ reporting that Senate control could once again come down to Nevada, **_The Washington Post_ is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection.**

* The GOP flooded Nevada with over $55 MILLION last year to try and turn this battleground state red.

* New polling in Nevada shows Democrats and Republicans NECK AND NECK **– but right now, we're falling short of the $100,000 we need to fight back and pull ahead.**

**In 2022, the GOP lost Nevada by a _razor-thin_ margin – just 0.77% – making it the closest Senate race in the entire country.** **To defeat them and defend this Democratic seat, we MUST reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal. clean_body: | | | Friend, national Republicans are attacking Sen. Jacky Rosen (D-NV) with everything they’ve got, and she's counting on your urgent grassroots support to fight back. Here's why: With FiveThirtyEight reporting that Senate control could once again come down to Nevada, The Washington Post is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. The GOP flooded Nevada with over $55 MILLION last year to try and turn this battleground state red. New polling in Nevada shows Democrats and Republicans NECK AND NECK – but right now, we're falling short of the $100,000 we need to fight back and pull ahead. In 2022, the GOP lost Nevada by a razor-thin margin – just 0.77% – making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. To defeat them and defend this Democratic seat, we MUST reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal.
