Wade_ America, we're working 24/7 to restore our reproductive rights. So here's what we're up to at EMILYs List:
* Soon we'll announce our first **2024 Senate and House endorsements** of some incredible Democratic pro-choice women ready to fight passionately for our reproductive rights — so stay tuned!

* We launched our **"On Notice" list of House Republicans** who have amassed appallingly anti-choice, anti-family records — and whom Democratic pro-choice women leaders are waiting in the wings to replace.

* We're preparing _right now_ for huge fights in state legislatures and pivotal elections to come in the coming weeks, including Mayor **Leirion Gaylor Baird's** key mayoral race in Lincoln, Nebraska, and Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** , our progressive candidate for Wisconsin Supreme Court.

With so much at stake, it is more important than ever that we come together and help elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who will fight for our fundamental rights, including abortion access. **That's why it's critical we hit our End-Of-Month goal of $175,000 by Tuesday at midnight.** ****But we can't do it without your help. We rely on the generosity of supporters like you to help fund our vital work. So please, Peter, can we count on your urgent support right now so that we can have the strongest possible start in recruiting and helping elect Democratic pro-choice women?**

clean_body: | | | Building winning campaigns starts with your urgent support today Peter, in a post-Roe v. Wade America, we're working 24/7 to restore our reproductive rights. So here's what we're up to at EMILYs List: Soon we'll announce our first 2024 Senate and House endorsements of some incredible Democratic pro-choice women ready to fight passionately for our reproductive rights — so stay tuned! We launched our "On Notice" list of House Republicans who have amassed appallingly anti-choice, anti-family records — and whom Democratic pro-choice women leaders are waiting in the wings to replace. We're preparing right now for huge fights in state legislatures and pivotal elections to come in the coming weeks, including Mayor Leirion Gaylor Baird's key mayoral race in Lincoln, Nebraska, and Judge Janet Protasiewicz , our progressive candidate for Wisconsin Supreme Court. With so much at stake, it is more important than ever that we come together and help elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who will fight for our fundamental rights, including abortion access. That's why it's critical we hit our End-Of-Month goal of $175,000 by Tuesday at midnight. But we can't do it without your help. We rely on the generosity of supporters like you to help fund our vital work. So please, Peter, can we count on your urgent support right now so that we can have the strongest possible start in recruiting and helping elect Democratic pro-choice women? Thank you for your support. \- the EMILYs List team ** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. EMILY's List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? | | February 26, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 2
---
| | **A Note from Hung Cao** While thousands of Americans are displaced, wondering how and when they can safely return to their homes and businesses in East Palestine, Ohio, President Joe Biden jetted off to Ukraine before the first anniversary of Russia’s invasion. This comes two weeks after the world watched a Chinese spy balloon nonchalantly float across the United States over strategic sites, recording high-quality radio frequency signals and imagery through sensors and ground-penetrating radar. Whether on the world stage or in our backyards, President Biden is failing us at every turn, and he’s made his message clear: he doesn’t care about the American people. We need leaders who understand what's at stake and have the foresight to guide us through the challenges ahead. I recently joined Unleash America PAC as its Honorary Chairman, supporting those who display those principles of authority, responsibility, and accountability. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d2e70003905f40c6b8a3081a8660771f&_e=1m397qoRf33c0QusnIImPyqac-Bfu236Qgp5ZmNoxG2y-N2zQjEJ-t90eW3tf6S7_Lv9soe7y4sBOdHsmsXKRvgo7RHKWR1VCoz4hynVktgxdgxDZNovl1SoMsGz1V6bSBiKvsUNrTy8mRMgV836iUzZvq8jFapvNcH5o4VqWpD6CVnZxlD3fpW12z7xv8VmsUfjg9IN-Aqpc91br_cRIRHy85Gh3iWXEHj_N2tPQq0DpvJi2W6WLGhEliQ6ZJG14zpa1qyRwzJcqeIyyIV08kVqQLSPXKDvD5dSR1Wk2MU%3D)
---
|
---
**President Biden Wants to Pay for Ukrainian Pensions** This week, President Biden visited Ukraine, mentioning that he wants to fund Ukrainian pensions with American tax dollars. What?? Unleash America called out the President’s hypocrisy on social media. The United States is a decade away from the insolvency of Social Security, a program that 66 million Americans rely on, and the President wants to use taxpayers' money to fund foreign retirement funds. Remember when the President claimed Republicans wanted to end social security during his State of the Union speech?
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d2e70003905f40c6b8a3081a8660771f&_e=1m397qoRf33c0QusnIImP3BoAIoAaTMjznMFV06gwdOeDrevJF3k38Zs5ZvLbnUEFjVu53hKTX24y72g0kRZoyovOwMyS-Pg8mjPFlP6zQB8bS7Relcn14nU_wjqL1nFvzvx9X3qp1evY74crN8XnWMJLIsPMnj6fEQw600GJg8h4GOZ20sVnLrj32_iScMukD_w397OLjtuUsD59aJNzvFyomdFgcfsXY4jgG-xCv2lf1HH-JZHqUCgoDHbspVVWn0txNDFNywM2kri0Pys9XOOeE336T0Rbc_lfGHv6LR0sAjh2lz9-MbqLIRATScVRdj7OHMkCbe08B6k7DbQXg%3D%3D)
---
**VA Democrats Continue to Act as a Roadblock to Meaningful Legislation** Whether it's legislation to provide for greater authority for parents to know what’s going on with their child at school or a bill to increase the penalties for fentanyl drug dealers, Democrats in Richmond reject all meaningful proposes to address the everyday challenges Virginians face. Our commonwealth deserves elected officials who work for the good of all, not those who are more focused on their next election.
---

clean_body: | | | | | February 26, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 2 | | A Note from Hung Cao While thousands of Americans are displaced, wondering how and when they can safely return to their homes and businesses in East Palestine, Ohio, President Joe Biden jetted off to Ukraine before the first anniversary of Russia’s invasion. This comes two weeks after the world watched a Chinese spy balloon nonchalantly float across the United States over strategic sites, recording high-quality radio frequency signals and imagery through sensors and ground-penetrating radar. Whether on the world stage or in our backyards, President Biden is failing us at every turn, and he’s made his message clear: he doesn’t care about the American people. We need leaders who understand what's at stake and have the foresight to guide us through the challenges ahead. I recently joined Unleash America PAC as its Honorary Chairman, supporting those who display those principles of authority, responsibility, and accountability. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | President Biden Wants to Pay for Ukrainian Pensions This week, President Biden visited Ukraine, mentioning that he wants to fund Ukrainian pensions with American tax dollars. What?? Unleash America called out the President’s hypocrisy on social media. The United States is a decade away from the insolvency of Social Security, a program that 66 million Americans rely on, and the President wants to use taxpayers' money to fund foreign retirement funds. Remember when the President claimed Republicans wanted to end social security during his State of the Union speech? VA Democrats Continue to Act as a Roadblock to Meaningful Legislation Whether it's legislation to provide for greater authority for parents to know what’s going on with their child at school or a bill to increase the penalties for fentanyl drug dealers, Democrats in Richmond reject all meaningful proposes to address the everyday challenges Virginians face. Our commonwealth deserves elected officials who work for the good of all, not those who are more focused on their next election. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you and we hope you have a great rest of your weekend! Be sure to follow Unleash America on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. | Team,

We’re going to be honest, this month has been tough when it comes to fundraising.

We’re just not seeing the type of fundraising that we saw in February 2019 or February 2021 that lead us to seeing wins during those election cycles.

We know that turning Arizona blue at the presidential level, winning House and Senate seats, and electing three Democrats to statewide offices happened because we built up resources early so we could organize early.

Now, with the opportunity to keep Arizona blue for the presidency, elect a Democrat to the Senate, and finally flip the Arizona legislature, we’re just not seeing the same early results we need to see.

clean_body: | | | Can you get us back on track? | | | Team, We’re going to be honest, this month has been tough when it comes to fundraising. We’re just not seeing the type of fundraising that we saw in February 2019 or February 2021 that lead us to seeing wins during those election cycles. Now, with the opportunity to keep Arizona blue for the presidency, elect a Democrat to the Senate, and finally flip the Arizona legislature, we’re just not seeing the same early results we need to see. Peter, can I be honest with you? I know it’s tempting to only focus on the positives, but I wanted to give you a real snapshot of where our fight for progress stands as we head into our third month of the year:

**_Still,_** millions of Americans are without access to safe reproductive health care; LGBTQ+ people are _nine times_ more likely than non-LGBTQ+ people to be victims of violent hate crimes; and approximately 40,000 Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends.

These chilling statistics make one thing clear: Our fight for justice is nowhere near complete. **That’s why I’m throwing myself headfirst into the fight – and I’m counting on you to join me, Peter.

[Please, before February ends, will you help me get 1,000 new Team James Members and help power our important, progressive work? I can’t win these fights without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319030/393822845/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk982-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc5OGY5Yi0yMWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgICIT2AfxopaurwSq3QkP3tJyp0N-g1nsbeBw0zkeM=)**

And I’m proud to say that, in my first term, we were able to win real change for the people of New York. But, with Republicans continuing to attack the rights of the most vulnerable, this work is nowhere near complete.

**Peter, the time to act is now. Together, we can move the needle for progress forward – I’ve seen us do it before. | Folks,

In 2022, thanks to the hard work of countless supporters like you, we defeated and unseated far-right extremists in elections across the country – including keeping John Gibbs out of office.

But Michigan is not immune to the threats of extremism. In fact, right here in West Michigan, far-right Republicans unseated several moderate Ottawa County board members, creating an extremist majority that is already supporting and enacting harmful policies.

**The new board has already closed the county’s office of diversity, equity, and inclusion; appointed a public health officer who supported ivermectin as a COVID-19 treatment; and changed the county’s motto from “Where You Belong” to “Where Freedom Rings.”**

I ran against extremism in 2022 and won, so I know this team can do it again. But with Republicans already working to strengthen the presence and influence of far-right politicians, we cannot afford to stop preparing for even a moment.

clean_body: | = | Folks, In 2022, thanks to the hard work of countless supporters like you, we defeated and unseated far-right extremists in elections across the country – including keeping John Gibbs out of office. But Michigan is not immune to the threats of extremism. In fact, right here in West Michigan, far-right Republicans unseated several moderate Ottawa County board members, creating an extremist majority that is already supporting and enacting harmful policies. The new board has already closed the county’s office of diversity, equity, and inclusion; appointed a public health officer who supported ivermectin as a COVID-19 treatment; and changed the county’s motto from “Where You Belong” to “Where Freedom Rings.” I ran against extremism in 2022 and won, so I know this team can do it again. But with Republicans already working to strengthen the presence and influence of far-right politicians, we cannot afford to stop preparing for even a moment. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our democracy is fragile
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]chip in a small donation toward
our February end-of-month fundraising goal, but first, I hope you'll give
me a chance to explain why your support is so important — especially so
early in the year.

Our democracy is fragile, and it is precious. The American experiment is
one of the most radical exercises in self-government in history, and for
the past several years, I have witnessed just how much of it is at risk.

I saw its fragility when a president of the United States abused his power
in ways that were once unthinkable. When a president withheld military aid
to Ukraine to extort that country into helping him cheat in the election.
And when Republican members of the House refused to stand up to him. I
witnessed its vulnerability when I led the first impeachment trial in
history to secure a bipartisan vote to remove a president, but in which
too many Republican Senators — all but one — failed to live up to their
oaths of office.

I've witnessed our democracy's fragility with the nationwide assault on
voting rights, and on the right to reproductive freedom.

And of course, I’ve witnessed the big lies of the former president and his
allies about our elections — and seen how they manifested in a violent
insurrection against the very government and Constitution we are sworn to
defend.

Mitch McConnell refused to bring Donald Trump’s second impeachment to
trial before Trump left office, and then claimed he couldn’t impeach him
because he had already left office. So much of the fight for our democracy
in the future will take place in the United States Senate. We cannot let
the opportunity to protect voting rights, and strengthen our democracy
pass us by because of an unconscionable devotion to the filibuster. In the
Senate, I will fight to pass the Protecting our Democracy Act, legislation
I authored and which was prevented from a vote by McConnell. And to do
away with the filibuster once and for all!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]Protecting our democracy, strengthening our economy and saving the
planet — this is why I'm running, and we have less than 72 hours until our
February deadline. We're running a bit behind our goal. So I’m asking: Can
you be one of the 81 donors we need to chip in from Pennsylvania to
reach our February goal?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=feb2023_abs_em.msIPvr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2023_abs_em.INbG7N&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2023_abs_em.wHRdOK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2023_abs_em.jtsgBy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2023_abs_em.IruUoY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for everything, and for taking the time to read this message.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=feb2023_abs_em.KAIBHh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1854%2E5257348%2EQSAcbN ]Privacy Policy

name: you have to see this update
subject: moms for Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We're running our February End-of-Month fundraising push with an ambitious goal of $10,000. With your help, these resources will help us elect a Democratic pro-choice mom like Katie Porter to U.S. Senate!
As a single mom, I can tell you that families across California want a Senator who knows firsthand what it means to raise a family in our country today. Someone like Katie Porter who is well aware of the rising cost at the grocery store and the difficulties with navigating child care over the past few years.
The truth is, we need big and bold changes to our social safety net if we truly care about supporting families and we need people in Congress who are willing to go big, or go home.
Please help us send a champion to the U.S. Senate who will not back down when it comes to fighting for moms, parents, children and families. Can we count on you to chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Did you know that nearly half of all Democratic voters are undecided in the CA U.S. Senate race?
We are expecting a very crowded primary race with at least 3 serious contenders and right now, Adam Schiff is in the lead. We are determined to reach as many undecided voters as possible to change this.
Can you show your support by chipping in what you can today? Katie has what it takes to win those voters but we need your early support to fund our outreach because the 2024 California primary is fast approaching. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Funding a statewide race takes serious resources and your early support could be a game-changer.
Our deadline is less than 72 hours away and we are falling short. Just take a look at this picture from our ActBlue account. We rely on grassroots supporters like you and every contribution helps us show the power of our movement behind candidates like Katie Porter who are champions for working families.
With your help, we can still reach our goal and get back on track if you chip in before midnight tonight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie] .
https://www.gov.ca.gov/2023/01/31/big-oil-made-record-2022-profits-while-fleecing-california-families/ [https://www.gov.ca.gov/2023/01/31/big-oil-made-record-2022-profits-while-fleecing-california-families/]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: fwd:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
Hi friend,
I hope you had a chance to read our finance team’s message from yesterday regarding our progress toward our next Primary Election fundraising goal.
We’re quickly approaching our February end-of-month deadline, and we could use your help.
Is there any way you could donate to help us finish this primary strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
We expect this to be a close election, so we need all hands on deck to get us over the edge. In a race like ours -- every dollar counts!
Here’s our ActBlue link again if you need it: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thank you for all the support!
-Lashrecse
– Begin Forwarded Message –
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
Lashrecse's finance team here.
We’re reaching out to ask for your support to help us meet our upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline.
Earlier today, we ran the numbers, and even with the immense amount of support from all corners of our district, we're running behind where we need to be on our fundraising goal for the primary.
Can we count on you to contribute today and help us close this gap? Here's our ActBlue page if you need it: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
We're currently making major budgeting decisions, so a missed goal will likely mean that we'll need to scale back our game plan. With so much on the line for our Commonwealth this year -- it's a chance none of us want to take.
By the end of Tuesday, we're hoping to get at least $4,500 in the door to stay on track with our strategy.
Anything you're able to contribute would be greatly appreciated!
Thanks again,
-Finance Team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.25.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.26.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

name: Team Sherrod
subject: FWD: Humbly asking for $26
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
The Hill called Sherrod one of the eight “most vulnerable” Senate Democrats up for re-election next year.
This won’t be easy -- that’s why we’re counting on supporters like you to step up and get involved.
Here’s one way you can help right now: Chip in $26 -- or any amount at all -- before midnight tonight. >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26]
We need to be ready for a fiercely competitive and expensive race, because Sherrod is one of Mitch McConnell’s biggest targets, and we can’t afford not to be prepared for Sherrod’s toughest race yet.
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
----------Original Message----------
SENDER: Sherrod Brown
DATE: Feb 25, 2023

Sherrod Brown Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]

Tomorrow is the 26th of the month, so today, I’m going to ask you to chip in our average online contribution of $26. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230226?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe230226_express_lane_5]

Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230226?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe230226_express_lane_10]

Express Donate $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230226?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe230226_express_lane_26]

Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230226?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=sbe230226_express_lane_100]

Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226]

Our organization runs on the generosity of people from all over Ohio and the country who are passionate about our shared values and our belief in a government that honors the Dignity of Work.
Together, we’ve won tough races in the past on the strength of that movement.
Because when an autoworker in Toledo chips in $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26] and a nurse in Columbus pitches in $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26] and a teacher in Steubenville contributes $26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26] , it adds up to a powerful coalition that has what it takes to compete in a competitive, must-win battleground.
That’s what we’re facing in the coming election.
Our race is one of the most competitive Senate contests on the map in 2024. The national GOP is already targeting me, and my first opponent is a wealthy state senator who bankrolled his campaign during last year’s Ohio Senate race -- including millions of dollars spent on ads so he could dominate the airwaves.
That’s OK -- one contribution at a time, we can out-organize our opponents, the GOP, and their dark-money machine. But that’s why I need to ask: Will you chip in before tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230226?refcode=sbe230226&amount=26]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=z8j%2BY3URh2UlC1il9QaQ1rwr4uKZwab5yHMCI0geEB3UuiG3CPk%2FJx3nHqsoQDx%2BF38zoekWgf9oY3klcRO3Vgbb%2BsdtAWsqf50xR%2B2KlxHWIu%2BinguqNM5DCD8NhFkCDvO4%2BULLjXlwZuhYcfWAFJ6sk6VdSiRA6cCeENuQjyXFSvibLpz7g%2FzQ4CRIqNF7VaItxRozqdI3O2U%2FvfNL%2FKNc9hAzBrglSJ%2Bx5FYLgA6%2FWQMbxs4qOxv93MjmqdC3kGLAfCt5xBNdrwlOyQcdxrY%2FtJZf2e3kvOxQ3d%2Bid1ajX0NkdBlNjQI3rr6SDto%2FJqUXOmpcfleF7d2r7o1GJCI9eEiGBXFcpSCNkrkqqb8Zz1gvqhYPWDOkMHfCNlhC8RLpei0SQf6b3yMvyuA9WNxClHzDa1pX%2FwW2ICsLLYAh%2F62RZ8YGhDmWFQiKBQz1 www.sherrodbrown.com [https://www.sherrodbrown.com/?emci=8c78dfd1-9807-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=18332626]

name: Team Vasquez
subject: Three things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319440/393824227/665653053?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230226eom2_tv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzgwOGJiYy0yNWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7vvQbb6mPUYMM1CpyjzHmrPc6uBgTYMmFApt-ozBi8=)

Team, There are three key things you need to know about this race before our February deadline:
1. Gabe’s opponent, former far-right extremist Rep. Yvette Herrell, has already filed to run for this House seat again in a 2024 rematch, and last time, we only won by 1,350 votes.

2. Cook Political Report has already named NM-02 a top TOSS-UP race in 2024, indicating this will once again be one of the closest and most critical House races in the country.

3. The NRCC is passing out a list of their top targets, and Gabe is one of them. If we’re going to take back the House majority, we can’t afford to lose this seat.

**This Tuesday, February 28, is our campaign’s second deadline of the year, and we’re still short on reaching our goal.** **[Help us rebuild and prepare for 2024 while Gabe fights for us in Congress: rush $10 or more now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319441/393824228/665653053?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230226eom2_tv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzgwOGJiYy0yNWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7vvQbb6mPUYMM1CpyjzHmrPc6uBgTYMmFApt-ozBi8=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: FILED: True the Vote Emergency Motion Reveals Worldwide Conspiracy
body:
Significant Evidence of Collusion to Destroy Evidence | | | | | |
---
| | **FILED: Emergency Motion Reveals Worldwide Conspiracy in Konnech Case**
On Friday, February 25th, True the Vote, Gregg Phillips, and I filed an Emergency Motion to inspect Konnech's electronic devices (specifically, items seized by Los Angeles County law enforcement during their October 2022 raid on Konnech properties in Michigan).
If this is the first you’ve heard of this case, [here’s more background.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0a4edb1b7b&e=ad8cba7e98)
[The complete filing is 46 pages long](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3400d33b2b&e=ad8cba7e98). Please read it. I promise it will be worth your time.
What we have said about Konnech is true. Our elections are at risk. Some of the largest counties in the United States, along with several states, are using software that is being developed in, run from, and monitored by, China. This must be stopped.
Please stand with us - there is a tremendous amount of work yet ahead. We will not back down. We will not quit.
Ever onward -
---
[**P.S. We need you**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ca4b067342&e=ad8cba7e98)**r help. Click here to make a tax-deductible donation.**
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d4b6a3a47f&e=ad8cba7e98)
_**Key excerpts from our filing.....**_
[**Motion for Leave**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=489ab920e6&e=ad8cba7e98)
“Defendants have advised the public that Konnech was not only storing personal identifying information of American election workers and American customer data on insecure servers in China, but that it was permitting unvetted nationals based in China access to the China-based servers and to the software itself.”
[**Exhibit C: Grant Bradley v. Konnech**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bc3e7e14a6&e=ad8cba7e98)****
“In approximately September 2022, following accusations made by True the Vote, Plaintiff began investigating the extent of the information provided by Defendant Konnech to the programmers based out of Wuhan, China. Plaintiff confirmed that Defendants Yu and Konnech had been providing to these Chinese programmers private data of poll workers, to include social security numbers and other personally identifying information.”
[**Exhibit D: Affidavit of Harry Haury**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=929530e357&e=ad8cba7e98)**** “During our investigation, Cain & Associates :
* a. confirmed multiple instances of Konnech hosting, on servers based in China, U.S. citizens’ personally identifiable information (PII);
* b. confirmed thousands of instances of Konnech data, including U.S. citizens’ PII, and software being transferred to and from China;
* c. found evidence in Konnech’s private company messages that elections software code was being developed, tested, and maintained in China. “

[**Exhibit E: Affidavit of Brian Glicklich**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=35704ec45d&e=ad8cba7e98)****
“Mr. McAllister indicated that he had seen my appearance on War Room the day before and had information relevant to the imprisonment of Catherine Engelbrecht and Gregg Phillips...”
“Mr. McAllister told me that on Monday October 10th, someone had started deleting Konnech company emails from a website in Vietnam. “
“... interpretation was that someone at Konnech intended to get rid of any emails with log files that may have gone to China.”
“Mr. McAllister indicated that Eugene’s brother runs a company that provides similar election software to the Chinese Communist Party.”
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c2f0eba6c3&e=ad8cba7e98)
Every day, China penetrates deeper into American life. Every day, our government minimizes and excuses Chinese interference in our society. Every time, someone says, "It's just a..." and makes an excuse. When does America stand up and recognize the truth, that China is secretly invading America? Join us in demanding better answers, fairer elections, and complete transparency.
|
---
**And in other news....What’s Up With the Washingtons?** A curiously empty office in Washington, D.C. ...And another canary out of the coalmine that is Washington state ...We’ll talk about this, along with the recent developments in the Konnech case, all on Monday night’s Locals ( 2/20, 7p et). Please join us if you can - [truethevote.locals.com](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=143fe044cd&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3b089c8019&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=03b35f75a6&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
| |

---
| | |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=b80eb19332) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=b80eb19332).
|

clean_body: | I don’t like bothering you on a Sunday, so let me get straight to the point. Last cycle, to combat the huge swaths of special interest-backed spending against us, my team had to use all of our resources to etch out our victory. Because of the competitiveness of our district, we firmly expect to have to do the same in 2024. But we’re starting from square one after the midterms, which is why every goal my team sets has to be met. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Why February is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I know it's a Sunday, but this is important:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319582/393824732/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE4NDllNi0yN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjSuXlgEnCbWLoAi9_5XZpBjt_PzXM6iKJGzOAQKD3k=) | I know it's a Sunday, so I'll keep it short, team:

February is the shortest month of the year, which means we have less time to reach our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. I want to take a moment to say thanks to all of you who have chipped in, _but we're still not quite where we need to be._

Already, election experts have rated Ohio's senate race a "toss-up." We have to hit every single deadline if we're going to fend off the extremist Republicans and defend the Senate majority.

I'm hoping we can count on your support: **[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help Ohio Democrats reach this goal before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319583/393824733/-1614137971?refcode=em23_230226_eom3_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230226_eom3_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE4NDllNi0yN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjSuXlgEnCbWLoAi9_5XZpBjt_PzXM6iKJGzOAQKD3k=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319584/393824734/-1614137971?refcode=em23_230226_eom3_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230226_eom3_fndd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE4NDllNi0yN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjSuXlgEnCbWLoAi9_5XZpBjt_PzXM6iKJGzOAQKD3k=)
Thank you,

Liz Walters
Chair

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: 63 million Americans are exposed to unsafe soot levels. The EPA must act NOW
body:
Join 30,000 environmentalists demanding stronger clean air standards |
---
| | **
THE EPA MUST ACT TO PREVENT DEATHS FROM POLLUTED AIR **
Everyone deserves to breathe clean air. A recent rule proposed by the EPA could create cleaner air for families and drastically reduce the number of pollution-related deaths and illnesses that overwhelmingly affect children and seniors.

****Here 's the problem: corporate polluters are lobbying for dangerous standards to protect their profits. We need your help: [Tell the EPA to set clean air standards that will protect the health of our children, our parents, and our grandparents.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqwPyXT7/TkkvVVVQcXEzcm5DUGFvc3BPMmhaWHpDU3FmVTk2MndEZGVJaUp1dzBLOExObi9MQkxyT1RobDgrNGY2aE5KMzM3SHJZcituQnFkUEtXdW1SYjVITUlLdVR3NWZOYkt2NjdteXRZa2E1eWM9S0/Wk9qcUtvaWlqcFYvbzVSUXE2TTBTSkdSOTdHVGdlSTVRSTA4N1h3enMvSDFhNGxKajdxck9vbEpqeE5WUE14MlREYjN5QlBLTnpBWjFqbitNKzJPRVE9PQS2)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqwPyXT7/TkkvVVVQcXEzcm5DUGFvc3BPMmhaWHpDU3FmVTk2MndEZGVJaUp1dzBLOExObi9MQkxyT1RobDgrNGY2aE5KMzM3SHJZcituQnFkUEtXdW1SYjVITUlLdVR3NWZOYkt2NjdteXRZa2E1eWM9S0/Wk9qcUtvaWlqcFYvbzVSUXE2TTBTSkdSOTdHVGdlSTVRSTA4N1h3enMvSDFhNGxKajdxck9vbEpqeE5WUE14MlREYjN5QlBLTnpBWjFqbitNKzJPRVE9PQS2)**

** **
|
Peter --

63 million Americans are currently exposed to unhealthy spikes of daily soot air pollution, and more than 20 million Americans experience dangerous soot pollution _year-round_.

**This is unacceptable. The EPA must act to stop it.**

****Soot pollution standards haven 't been reviewed in over a decade, but right now, the EPA is accepting public input on a proposal to strengthen those pollution limits. We must demand that the EPA seize this moment to clean up our air, advance environmental justice, and protect our health by enacting the strongest science-based safeguards against soot pollution.

[We're calling on every LCV member to take action NOW: Add your name and urge the EPA to enact the strongest possible standards to limit soot pollution and protect public health.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqwPyXT7/TkkvVVVQcXEzcm5DUGFvc3BPMmhaWHpDU3FmVTk2MndEZGVJaUp1dzBLOExObi9MQkxyT1RobDgrNGY2aE5KMzM3SHJZcituQnFkUEtXdW1SYjVITUlLdVR3NWZOYkt2NjdteXRZa2E1eWM9S0/Wk9qcUtvaWlqcFYvbzVSUXE2TTBTSkdSOTdHVGdlSTVRSTA4N1h3enMvSDFhNGxKajdxck9vbEpqeE5WUE14MlREYjN5QlBLTnpBWjFqbitNKzJPRVE9PQS2)

Preventing soot pollution is critical to meeting President Biden's promise to address environmental racism and systemic injustices affecting communities of color.

A recent study found that soot exposure from power plants, cars, trucks, and other industrial sources disproportionately burdens Black and Hispanic populations who are more likely to work and live near these highly-concentrated pollution areas.

For generations, Black activists have fought to address the disproportionate harm from toxic pollution, climate-induced disasters, and public health crises afflicting communities of color. The modern environmental justice movement was born in 1982 when activists in Warren County, North Carolina protested for weeks against an EPA decision establishing a landfill in their majority-Black community that would expose residents to more cancer-causing toxins.

The residents of Warren County brought long-overdue attention to the inequities that result from decisions to burden predominantly Black and other communities of color with pollution -- inequities that continue to persist in our society to this day.

**Justice for communities impacted by environmental racism is long overdue -- the EPA has a chance here to make a real impact and they have to get this right.**

|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION TO
FIGHT SOOT POLLUTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqwPyXT7/TkkvVVVQcXEzcm5DUGFvc3BPMmhaWHpDU3FmVTk2MndEZGVJaUp1dzBLOExObi9MQkxyT1RobDgrNGY2aE5KMzM3SHJZcituQnFkUEtXdW1SYjVITUlLdVR3NWZOYkt2NjdteXRZa2E1eWM9S0/Wk9qcUtvaWlqcFYvbzVSUXE2TTBTSkdSOTdHVGdlSTVRSTA4N1h3enMvSDFhNGxKajdxck9vbEpqeE5WUE14MlREYjN5QlBLTnpBWjFqbitNKzJPRVE9PQS2)**

The Biden administration has the opportunity to protect public health and advance environmental justice by listening to the 167 public health and environmental organizations urging adoption of **stronger soot standards that could save 20,000 lives a year.**

Setting stronger soot safeguards will not only protect our health from dangerous and deadly pollutants, but _also_ accelerate the transition to a clean energy economy by reducing our dependence on polluting energy sources like coal.****

[Tell the EPA and the Biden administration to swiftly pass a strong rule that matches the president's commitments to cut dangerous pollution and protect our health and environment.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTqwPyXT7/TkkvVVVQcXEzcm5DUGFvc3BPMmhaWHpDU3FmVTk2MndEZGVJaUp1dzBLOExObi9MQkxyT1RobDgrNGY2aE5KMzM3SHJZcituQnFkUEtXdW1SYjVITUlLdVR3NWZOYkt2NjdteXRZa2E1eWM9S0/Wk9qcUtvaWlqcFYvbzVSUXE2TTBTSkdSOTdHVGdlSTVRSTA4N1h3enMvSDFhNGxKajdxck9vbEpqeE5WUE14MlREYjN5QlBLTnpBWjFqbitNKzJPRVE9PQS2)

Thank you for using your voice to advocate for cleaner air for all Americans, for generations to come.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters

---

name: Jon Tester
subject: You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319902/393825831/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ3Mjc5My0yOWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p7IeuEGUD1M7jvZa0v4yoWPypqcq9ucBlMoxUtELQAk=&emci=7ac79524-6ab4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e1472793-29b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics of our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**

[**_I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign and split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my team to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59319903/393825832/-1883314608?refcode=20230226.2_JT_2AW&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ3Mjc5My0yOWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p7IeuEGUD1M7jvZa0v4yoWPypqcq9ucBlMoxUtELQAk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong, and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,

Jon

name: Vice President Kamala Harris
subject: Derek, the DNC needs your support before Tuesday’sdeadline:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The Democratic National Committee’s fundraising deadline is on Tuesday, and they’re already planning to win future elections. Can you help expand their investments and win nationwide? | |
---
Derek, this grassroots team has helped Democrats accomplish so much. Last year, we secured historic funding for infrastructure, clean energy, and manufacturing. Now, we’re putting those investments to work. We're breaking ground on more than 20,000 projects that will transform communities, create good-paying jobs, and build a better future. **But this was just the start of our work -- we have to finish the job.** To build on the progress we’ve made together, we need to elect more Democrats in Pennsylvania and nationwide who are ready to get to work on day one -- and that starts with hitting Tuesday’s fundraising goal. **The DNC is relying on the full support of this team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 before Tuesday’s deadline?**

clean_body: The Democratic National Committee’s fundraising deadline is on Tuesday, and they’re already planning to win future elections. Can you help expand their investments and win nationwide? | | Derek, this grassroots team has helped Democrats accomplish so much. Last year, we secured historic funding for infrastructure, clean energy, and manufacturing. Now, we’re putting those investments to work. We're breaking ground on more than 20,000 projects that will transform communities, create good-paying jobs, and build a better future. But this was just the start of our work -- we have to finish the job. To build on the progress we’ve made together, we need to elect more Democrats in Pennsylvania and nationwide who are ready to get to work on day one -- and that starts with hitting Tuesday’s fundraising goal. The DNC is relying on the full support of this team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 before Tuesday’s deadline? The Democratic National Committee is planning for future elections right now, Derek. We know that we’ll need to expand investments in organizing programs, voter protection services, and state-of-the-art data and technology to ensure Democratic candidates can run winning campaigns. This team’s investment in the DNC is funding the programs Democratic candidates across the country need to win elections. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: a short note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Launching this campaign has been something I will never forget.
#

Hello Peter.
I wanted to send a quick note before the end of the weekend.
Launching this campaign has been something I will never forget. The response has exceeded every single expectation I could have had.
Like, I grew up poor. Sleeping on the floor or on a couch. I had a single mom. Statistically speaking, I am far more likely to have ended up in prison than in Congress.
It’s amazing. Thank you.
But right now, my goal is to end this first full month of the campaign with as many donations as we can possibly get. To me, the number of donations is just as important as the amount we raise.
So please? Cause every donation leads to another — and each leads to more endorsements and brings us closer to winning.
[**So if you can, please add one donation before our first full end-of-month fundraising comes to a close. It would mean a lot to me personally.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230226-2-15-b&t=4&akid=424%2E734936%2EwjVVnd)
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=424%2E734936%2EwjVVnd). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=424_734936_wjVVnd&akid=424%2E734936%2EwjVVnd)

name: Giffords
subject: The NRA is losing influence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In 2018, the NRA had 5.5 million members. But since its 2019 corruption scandal, NRA membership now stands at just 4.3 million members.
#

Friends -
New reporting reveals that the NRA has taken a massive hit to their membership due to the corruption allegations against its CEO and Executive Vice President, Wayne LaPierre.
In 2018, the NRA had 5.5 million members. But since its 2019 corruption scandal, NRA membership now stands at just 4.3 million members. This is the smallest it has been since 2012.
**This report makes it clear: the NRA is continuing to lose influence.**
More people are realizing that the corporate gun lobby stands for profit above all else. But after years of pushing dangerous rhetoric and creating a culture of fear, it’s going to take all of us to keep fighting back against the harmful impact that the gun lobby has made on our country.
A big part of being able to fight back against the NRA is meeting our fundraising goals. In just two days, we’re facing our February end-of-month fundraising deadline, and as of now we’re pacing behind where we need to be.
[**So we’re asking you today: Will you please make your first online contribution to Giffords PAC? Your contribution gives us the resources we need to stand up against the gun lobby’s dark influence on our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230226-2-30-nor&t=1&akid=4320%2E3935704%2ERrMDRm)

name: VoteVets
subject: Asking for $5 to help us run a campaign to ban Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity being played on military installations.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
They helped convince members of the Military to attend and participate in the attacks. A Veteran who was radicalized by these lies was killed in the attack.
#
Derek -
We are running a campaign urging the United States Armed Forces to ban the showing of Fox News hosts who deliberately lied about “election fraud” claims on Military installations and we need your help.
Here’s why:
Their lies led to the insurrection.
Officers were attacked, many were Veterans. People died because of those lies. Lives were forever changed.
They helped convince members of the Military to attend and participate in the attacks. A Veteran who was radicalized by these lies was killed in the attack.
Airing disinformation on Military installations threatens Military readiness by creating division in the ranks.
The violence they incited in advance of January 6th, 2021 was against the same Constitution our Military swore to protect.
The Pentagon must act to protect our Military from anti-American radicalization from these hosts.
That’s why we’re running this campaign. But we need your help to make it happen. So please:
**[Make a $5 contribution to VoteVets and we will put your donation to work fighting disinformation targeting Veterans and Military family members peddled by the far-right and Fox News.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230226-2-15&t=1&akid=7749%2E3013755%2EVyF268)

| | The first 2024 "crystal ball" ratings from the University of Virginia's Center for Politics were just published. Right here in Washington state, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's campaign has been rated a "Toss Up". So, it is time to raise the alarm – after all, **she is just one of five Democrats who won a district won by Donald Trump in 2020.** **[I am asking you to make an early donation to Marie's campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59320750/393828882/418535011?refcode=2023-02-26-larsenformgp&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5c2462f4-30b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzI0NjJmNC0zMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-boX1lEre0ud6o48gEa5hZXNk_Jt2-je-SRAXZ1Wg3k=)** _Why?_ Because her re-election depends a great deal on whether she is able to muster the kind of year-round organizing required to reach the hardest-to-reach voters. clean_body: | | | | The first 2024 "crystal ball" ratings from the University of Virginia's Center for Politics were just published. Right here in Washington state, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's campaign has been rated a "Toss Up". So, it is time to raise the alarm – after all, she is just one of five Democrats who won a district won by Donald Trump in 2020. = Why? Because her re-election depends a great deal on whether she is able to muster the kind of year-round organizing required to reach the hardest-to-reach voters. Because Kevin McCarthy and his special interest allies are already geared up to attack Marie. Because we need to do everything we can to take back the House, and we cannot afford to lose a Democratic seat right here in Washington. = = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Marie Gluesenkamp Perez and Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I am counting on you. = Rick | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .
